product_name: Easy Guy - Army Green Duck Selvedge
description_html:

product_name: Zip Jacket - All Natural Ecru Foxfibre® Selvedge
description_html:
Introducing the All Natural Ecru Foxfibre® Selvedge, a 13.6oz Japanese Selvedge denim that marries an unbleached organic cotton exterior warp with a rare, naturally colored organic cotton known as Foxfibre®. Developed by Sally Fox, Foxfibre® cotton is grown in rich, natural earth tones that eliminate the need for bleaching or dyeing. As we say, 'If you can grow the color, there's no need to dye it." This cotton is sourced exclusively from a single farm in Texas dedicated to sustainable organic farming practices. With each wash and wear, Foxfibre® cotton develops a deeper patina, intensifying to a richer, warmer tone. This unique color evolution is visible through the front face of the fabric along the twill lines, imparting a distinctive earthy tone to the jeans. The blend of Foxfibre® brown cotton weft with the natural cotton warp gives the denim a warm, natural tone, enriched with brown neps that add depth and richness to the fabric. The denim is finished with a brown selvedge ID, also made using Foxfibre® cotton. The jeans feature a  vegan friendly paper based patch. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, the jacket features contrast stitching and silver metallic hardware. 

The Zip Jacket is a classic fit jacket with a front zip closure, and side welt pockets. Triple stitched seams for extra durability.

product_name: Easy Guy - Tabi Selvedge - Off White
description_html:
The Tabi Selvedge is an 11.5oz Japanese selvedge denim woven from a blend of 75% cotton and 25% linen. The addition of linen introduces visible texture, with natural slub and seed flecks creating a tactile surface that cannot be achieved with cotton alone.

The fabric takes its name from traditional Japanese tabi textiles, historically produced from short-staple cotton grown in the Kojima region. These early fabrics were known for their rough, uneven texture, qualities intentionally echoed in this modern interpretation.

An off-white ecru base is accented by a pale pink selvedge edge in production, adding subtle contrast. A natural vegetable-tanned leather patch completes the fabric, allowing both denim and leather to age gracefully together.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

product_name: Weird Guy - MIJ15 - Hand Dyed Natural Indigo Kakishibu Intangible Cultural Treasure Selvedge Denim
description_html:
This limited-edition release is part of our Made in Japan series, where we take the most traditional techniques, use the best materials we can get our hands on, and build everything with old-school construction. The MIJ15 is a 15oz selvedge denim, and the yarns are dyed using two ancient natural dyes—indigo and kakishibu.

The warp is dyed in Tokushima, on Shikoku Island, using a process that’s been around for hundreds of years. It’s such an important part of Japanese culture that it’s officially recognized as an Intangible Cultural Treasure. The yarns are bundled into hanks, dipped into natural indigo dye vats that are literally buried in the ground, then pulled out and oxidized in the open air. But because the yarn is bundled, some parts are exposed more than others. So what you get is uneven oxidation across the yarn—some parts darker, some lighter—and that creates a really rich, varied range of indigo shades across the fabric. This only happens with natural dye, and only when it’s done by hand. The weft is dyed with kakishibu, which is made from fermented persimmon. This dye’s been used in Japan for over a thousand years, and it gives the yarn a kind of burnt orange or brown tone that comes through the surface of the denim. The mix of that color underneath the indigo, plus the texture from the slubby yarns, gives this fabric so much dimension. It almost looks like it’s glowing in certain lighting.

The patch is real Shell Cordovan—dense horsehide that ages beautifully. And all the MIJ details are here: 100% iron buttons, copper rivets, raised belt loops, hidden back pocket rivets, selvedge fly, and the peekaboo selvedge on the coin pocket.

The Weird Guy is a regular tapered fit; medium rise, standard thigh and slight taper from the knee to hem.

  • MIJ15 - Hand Dyed Natural Indigo Kakishibu Intangible Cultural Treasure Selvedge Denim
  • STYLE / FIT — Weird Guy
  • 15oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101133903

product_name: Weird Guy - Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Sea Island Selvedge is a 12oz Japanese selvedge denim crafted from Virgin American Sea Island Cotton—the most luxurious denim we’ve ever produced. Sea Island Cotton is an ultra-rare Extra-Long Staple cotton. Renowned for its silky luster, uniform texture, cashmere-like softness, and exceptional durability, this cotton has a rich and storied past. Originally cultivated in the West Indies in the 1600s, it was once so coveted that British royalty tried to keep it exclusive. In the 1800s, seeds made their way to the American colonies, but a devastating beetle infestation nearly wiped it out in the 1920s.

Fast forward to 2015…. seeds that were tucked away in a seed vault are plated in Texas and New Mexico. This American-grown strain, genetically identical to the original variety, is now being used by select Japanese mills, including ours. Inspired by 1920s-era denim, this fabric offers a glimpse into an alternate history. What if Sea Island Cotton had become the standard? Imagine a world where silky-soft, ultra-durable jeans was the norm! Finishing details include contrast stitching, a durable paper patch, antique copper hardware, and a pink selvedge ID.

 The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • 12oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

description_html:
The Chocolate Milk Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim made from a distinctive blend of 77% cotton and 23% milk protein fiber derived from casein. The milk protein is processed into fiber through a liquid solution and spinneret extrusion before being spun into yarn and blended with cotton.

The brown-toned weft is carefully matched to the color of chocolate milk, subtly visible beneath the indigo surface and becoming more pronounced as the denim fades. This interaction creates depth and warmth that evolves naturally with wear.

A red-and-white twisted selvedge edge references the striped paper straws commonly seen in vintage chocolate milk advertisements. Cow-print pocket bags and a hair-on-hide leather patch complete the concept, balancing technical novelty with playful detail.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

product_name: Heritage Jacket - MIJ 14 - Haru Kaze Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ14 – Haru Kaze Selvedge marks the first lightweight denim in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan line. Weighing in at just 8.6oz, this denim is crafted in a 2x1 workwear style using lightweight slub yarn. The result is a fabric rich in neps on both the warp and weft sides.

Made from 100% recycled cotton, the interior weft is dyed brown, giving the denim a warm, inviting tone. This denim is loomstate, meaning it hasn't gone through conventional finishing processes like anti-skewing, singeing, or sanforization. This preserves the denim's natural hairy and slubby texture, and over time, the legs will twist—a hallmark of traditional denim craftsmanship. To manage shrinkage, the denim undergoes a tempi treatment—a soak and hang-dry process that eliminates shrinkage while maintaining the crispy raw feel.

Finishing touches include a sheepskin leather patch, 100% copper rivets with hidden back pocket rivets, and 100% iron buttons—hardware that will patina and age gracefully alongside the denim. Additionally, the signature Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan maple leaf embroidery is proudly featured on the back pocket.

The Heritage Jacket pays homage to old type denim jackets capturing the essence of vintage style.  It features a pleated front, flap chest pockets and adjustable rear buttons to ensure the perfect fit.

product_name: Super Guy -  Brown Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Brown Fox Selvedge, a 13oz Japanese selvedge denim made entirely from organic FoxFibre® cotton—grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This denim contains no dyes or bleach. The brown color comes directly from the cotton plant itself.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown cotton varieties with white Pima to create long-staple, naturally pigmented cotton that could be commercially spun. Her work eliminated the need for chemical dyes, significantly reducing the environmental impact of textile production. The FoxFibre® used in this denim is grown using regenerative organic farming methods, making it one of the most sustainable cotton sources available.

The denim is woven in Okayama, Japan, and spun in Osaka, using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown weft yarns. The result is a warm, earthy-toned fabric with subtle surface variation and a soft hand. Over time, the fabric darkens and develops a rich patina with wear and washing.

The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

  • 100% Organic FoxFibre® Cotton
  • Button Fly

product_name: True Guy - MIJ13 - Okayama Spirit Kuro
description_html:
Presenting the 'Okayama Spirit Kuro," the 13th edition of the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection. Taking inspiration from the original Okayama Spirit denim, this striking all-black silhouette is a seamless transformation - with "Kuro" meaning black in Japanese.

Crafted from 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim, the Okayama Spirit Kuro showcases a unique, uneven texture. The sulfur-dyed cotton yarns create an irregular tone, as the thicker sections absorb more dye while the thinner sections absorb less. When worn over time shades of black will fade to grey, creating an aesthetically pleasing uneven tone that gracefully fades at different rates, attributing to the unique look of this denim.  Enhanced by the slow weaving on vintage shuttle looms, the wavy weave pattern contributes to the denim's organic, uneven grain - a signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured appearance.

The Okayama Spirit Kuro Black undergoes a tempi treatment to preserve its hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture, ensuring you can select the perfect size from the start. The Okayama Spirit Kuro also boasts a host of finishing touches that enhance its character, including blacked-out iron capped buttons that rust, copper rivets that oxidize, raised belt loops that fade, a black deerskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. A maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket is a signature touch of the MIJ series.  

Every aspect of the Okayama Spirit Kuro is meticulously crafted in Japan, guaranteeing its superior quality. The expert craftsmanship behind each pair is evident in the intricate details and care taken throughout the entire production process, from dyeing the yarn and weaving the fabric to cutting and sewing the denim.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton

  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan

description_html:
The Printed Autumn Corduroy Seersucker is a 5oz Japanese fabric that blends two classic textile textures into one distinctive cloth. The corduroy element is created with fine vertical ridges, while the seersucker effect comes from weaving some yarns at a looser tension, causing the fabric to naturally pucker. Fun fact : seersucker dates back to colonial India, its name rooted in the Persian words for “milk and sugar,” referencing its smooth-and-rough contrast. This dual construction produces a highly textured surface that feels dimensional to the touch.

The lightweight 5oz weight makes it comfortable for year-round wear, while the printed autumn pattern adds seasonal character. The raised and recessed areas of the fabric interact with the print, giving it subtle depth and variation. Despite its visual complexity, the fabric is made from 100% cotton, offering breathability and softness.

The True Shirt is a classic button-up that fits nice and easy, and features a straight hem for an effortless, casual look.

product_name: Weird Guy - MIJ13 - Okayama Spirit Kuro
description_html:
Presenting the 'Okayama Spirit Kuro," the 13th edition of the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection. Taking inspiration from the original Okayama Spirit denim, this striking all-black silhouette is a seamless transformation - with "Kuro" meaning black in Japanese.

Crafted from 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim, the Okayama Spirit Kuro showcases a unique, uneven texture. The sulfur-dyed cotton yarns create an irregular tone, as the thicker sections absorb more dye while the thinner sections absorb less. When worn over time shades of black will fade to grey, creating an aesthetically pleasing uneven tone that gracefully fades at different rates, attributing to the unique look of this denim.  Enhanced by the slow weaving on vintage shuttle looms, the wavy weave pattern contributes to the denim's organic, uneven grain - a signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured appearance.

The Okayama Spirit Kuro Black undergoes a tempi treatment to preserve its hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture, ensuring you can select the perfect size from the start. The Okayama Spirit Kuro also boasts a host of finishing touches that enhance its character, including blacked-out iron capped buttons that rust, copper rivets that oxidize, raised belt loops that fade, a black deerskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. A maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket is a signature touch of the MIJ series.  

Every aspect of the Okayama Spirit Kuro is meticulously crafted in Japan, guaranteeing its superior quality. The expert craftsmanship behind each pair is evident in the intricate details and care taken throughout the entire production process, from dyeing the yarn and weaving the fabric to cutting and sewing the denim.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan

product_name: True Shirt - Corduroy Shirting (21W) - Navy / Green
description_html:
The Corduroy Shirting is a lightweight 4.5oz Japanese fabric featuring a fine 21-wale construction, meaning it has 21 ridges (or “wales”) per inch for a delicate, velvety nap. Lightweight corduroy like this was popularized in England in the 18th century, evolving from rough Egyptian fustian and once referred to as “cord du roi” or “the king’s cord,” worn by nobility.

Adding to its character, the reverse side of the fabric features a check pattern, giving the garment a hidden detail that speaks to the craftsmanship behind the material. The fine wale texture provides visual richness without the bulk of heavier corduroy, making it comfortable for year-round wear.

The True Shirt is a classic button-up that fits nice and easy, and features a straight hem for an effortless, casual look.

product_name: Super Guy - Secret Agent Denim - Bleach Blue
description_html:
The Secret Agent Denim is a 14oz Japanese denim developed from a fabric that was nearly discarded. During development in Japan, an entire lot of denim was unintentionally sun-exposed, resulting in uneven coloration that made it unsuitable for standard production.

Rather than allowing the fabric to go to waste, the mill collaborated with a nearby Japanese dye house to carefully bleach the denim at the fabric stage. This process transformed the material into a pale, cloudy indigo with a soft, consistent finish. The fabric is received in this state and cut and sewn without any garment washing.

Despite the bleaching process, the denim retains substantial body and durability at 14oz, while offering improved drape and comfort from the start. Finished with a full-grain leather patch, Secret Agent Denim reflects a creative rescue that turns imperfection into character.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.
  • Secret Agent Denim - Bleach Blue
  • STYLE / FIT — Super Guy
  • 14oz Japanese Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Indigo (fabric bleached)
  • Full-grain leather patch
  • Made in Canada

product_name: Weird Guy - MIJ7 - Yahan Midnight Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ7 ¢‚¬€œ Yahan Midnight Selvedge is an unsanforized 17oz slubby Japanese selvedge denim dyed to such a deep shade of indigo that it appears black. Indigo rope dyeing is a delicate process of running cotton yarns through two story dye vats quickly enough that the dye cannot penetrate the core of the yarn. Then the yarn dries and is dipped again, dries and is dipped again. The yarns are dipped dozens of times to achieve that raw denim shade. But here, with just a little black dye added, these yarns have been dyed over and over so many times that they appear black. With wear and age, the opposite process occurs. Each layer of indigo chips away revealing dark blues, then medium bright blues, then light blues, then finally the white core of the yarn. This fabric is made to celebrate the full spectrum of variegated indigo shades. The yarns themselves are irregular, slubby, and woven loosely giving the fabric an organic, uneven grain. The denim is unsanforized but tempi treated, which shrinks the fabric but protects the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. The MIJ7 builds in the unparalleled detailing of the Made in Japan collection: black iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the ¢‚¬œFlower of Carnage¢‚¬� logo, the MIJ maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, micro busted outseam, and a selvedge button fly. Dyed, woven, cut, sewn, built in Japan. The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
The Chocolate Milk Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim made from a distinctive blend of 77% cotton and 23% milk protein fiber derived from casein. The milk protein is processed into fiber through a liquid solution and spinneret extrusion before being spun into yarn and blended with cotton.

The brown-toned weft is carefully matched to the color of chocolate milk, subtly visible beneath the indigo surface and becoming more pronounced as the denim fades. This interaction creates depth and warmth that evolves naturally with wear.

A red-and-white twisted selvedge edge references the striped paper straws commonly seen in vintage chocolate milk advertisements. Cow-print pocket bags and a hair-on-hide leather patch complete the concept, balancing technical novelty with playful detail.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

description_html:
The Citrus Kasuri Weft Selvedge is a 14oz Japanese selvedge denim distinguished by its complex weft dyeing technique. Beneath the indigo surface lies a vibrant interior created using traditional Kasuri methods.

Rather than inserting solid-colored weft yarns, Kasuri dyeing involves binding and selectively dyeing sections of yarn before weaving. This results in alternating yellow and green segments along the same yarn, producing organic, patterned coloration rather than uniform stripes.

As the denim wears and abrasions develop, the citrus-toned weft gradually reveals itself through the indigo surface. Due to the labor-intensive nature of Kasuri dyeing, this fabric is used sparingly, making it both expressive and rare.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • 14oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

  • Natural vegetable-tanned leather patch

The Maekake Dobby is a 12.2oz Japanese dobby fabric inspired by traditional maekake aprons worn by sake merchants and laborers. Historically, these aprons were woven densely to protect against sharp tools, heat, and heavy use.

This modern interpretation maintains that dense structure while being fabric-rinsed to enhance softness and comfort from first wear. The rinse treatment also highlights the fabric’s layered indigo tones, allowing subtle gradients to emerge over time.

Finished with a Horween Cavalier Ink Blue Chromexcel leather patch, the fabric pairs deep indigo with richly hued leather, both designed to age together.

The Kimono shirt, crafted as a modern tribute to the rich heritage of Japan, draws its design from the traditional Japanese noragi, historically worn by laborers. This jacket seamlessly blends cultural authenticity with contemporary fashion.

description_html:
The Frankenstein Denim is a 14oz Japanese denim, intricately woven in an alternating twill pattern. True to its name, this denim is a mishmash of various construction details. The weave pattern alternates every 2 inches between left-hand twill and right-hand twill throughout the fabric. Since this denim does not adhere to a single twill direction, it cannot undergo anti-skewing, a traditional finishing process designed to eliminate the natural twist of the fabric. Consequently, the sections of left-hand and right-hand twill will twist along their bias over time, enhancing the fabric’s dynamic texture. Crafted with big slub yarns that alternate between thick and thin sections, this denim not only offers an incredible texture but also affects dye penetration during the rope dyeing process. This results in sections of the yarn fading at different rates, revealing a stunning spectrum of indigo hues as the denim ages. Made from 100% cotton, this denim offers a classic rigid raw denim feel. The jeans feature an upside-down leather patch—a distinctive hallmark found only in the Frankenstein Denim series. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware. 

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • Revival Frankenstein Denim
  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 14oz Japanese Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada

product_name: Weird Guy - Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Leatherface Selvedge is our Halloween release, built around one of the most legendary horror films of all time: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre (1974). Grainy, brutal, and stripped of polish, the movie still feels dangerous, like something that wasn’t supposed to make it to theaters. Its tension comes from what it withholds: there’s little blood, no music, and almost no dialogue from the killer. Just heat, noise, and panic.

This fabric is made with 100% Texas-grown cotton, It’s spun into a 14.5oz rope-dyed indigo selvedge denim with a pale yellow weft, echoing Leatherface’s worn butcher’s apron. The color isn’t bright or clean, it’s the muted, washed-out yellow you see in aged canvas under harsh light.

The selvedge ID is finished in silver and red, nodding to the chrome of the chainsaw and the violence it leaves behind. The fabric is woven in Japan on shuttle looms, giving it a rigid hand and vertical texture that will evolve with wear and fade with time.

Each pair includes a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch, embossed and foil-stamped with officially licensed Leatherface artwork. The pocket bags are fully printed in color with film stills from the original 1974 release. And the co-branded woven label pulls from an actual newspaper ad used to promote the movie’s theatrical run.

Every element was designed to feel true to the film.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

product_name: Denim Jacket  - The Cat’s Pyjamas Selvedge - Blue
description_html:
The Cat’s Pajamas Selvedge is an 8.5oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by early 20th-century workwear and 1920s reproduction fabrics. The name references period slang, when “the cat’s pajamas” was used to describe something exceptional, capturing the spirit of the era this fabric draws from.

Woven with a soft vintage indigo tone and a subtle beige weft, the fabric presents a warm, aged appearance that feels historically grounded rather than modern. A classic white selvedge edge reinforces its traditional construction.

While 8.5oz is considered lightweight today, early 1900s catalogs often marketed 9oz denim as “ultra heavyweight,” making this fabric a faithful interpretation of period-correct denim. Its lighter weight makes it especially suitable for spring and summer while maintaining structure and authenticity.

True to its historical reference, the fabric is finished with a reinforced paper patch rather than leather, reflecting the materials used before leather patches became standard. Tin buttons complete the reproduction-inspired detailing.

The Denim Jacket a classic denim jacket cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with slash front pockets, inner pocket bags, and chest flap pockets.

description_html:
The Dia De Los Muertos Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by Mexico’s vibrant Day of the Dead tradition. Woven in Okayama, Japan on vintage shuttle looms, it uses rope-dyed short slub yarns to create a textured surface that will develop dramatic, high-contrast vertical fades over time. Made from 100% Mexican upland cotton, this denim pays tribute to its roots with a multicolor selvedge ID inspired by traditional Mexican sarape blankets. Additional details include contrast stitching, silver metallic hardware, and a vegetable-tanned leather patch and pocket flasher featuring original artwork by Mexico City tattoo artist José Ruiz (aka Koopa). His illustration depicts a skeleton guided to the underworld by a Xoloitzcuintli, the sacred Mexican hairless dog believed to escort souls to the afterlife.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

product_name: Easy Guy - MIJ14 - Haru Kaze Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ14 – Haru Kaze Selvedge marks the first lightweight denim in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan line. Weighing in at just 8.6oz, this denim is crafted in a 2x1 workwear style using lightweight slub yarn. The result is a fabric rich in neps on both the warp and weft sides.


Made from 100% recycled cotton, the interior weft is dyed brown, giving the denim a warm, inviting tone. This denim is loomstate, meaning it hasn't gone through conventional finishing processes like anti-skewing, singeing, or sanforization. This preserves the denim's natural hairy and slubby texture, and over time, the legs will twist—a hallmark of traditional denim craftsmanship. To manage shrinkage, the denim undergoes a tempi treatment—a soak and hang-dry process that eliminates shrinkage while maintaining the crispy raw feel.

Finishing touches include a sheepskin leather patch, 100% copper rivets with hidden back pocket rivets, and 100% iron buttons—hardware that will patina and age gracefully alongside the denim. Additionally, the signature Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan maple leaf embroidery is proudly featured on the back pocket.


The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

product_name: Heritage Denim Jacket - MIJ12 - Aomidori Selvedge
description_html:
Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.

There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.

Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.

To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.

The jacket also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, and a selvedge placket. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the front pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.

Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.

The Heritage Jacket pays homage to old type denim jackets capturing the essence of vintage style.  It features a pleated front, flap chest pockets and adjustable rear buttons to ensure the perfect fit.

The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.The jacket also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, and a selvedge placket. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the front pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.The Heritage Jacket pays homage to old type denim jackets capturing the essence of vintage style.  It features a pleated front, flap chest pockets and adjustable rear buttons to ensure the perfect fit.

description_html:
The Tabi Selvedge is an 11.5oz Japanese selvedge denim woven from a blend of 75% cotton and 25% linen. The addition of linen introduces visible texture, with natural slub and seed flecks creating a tactile surface that cannot be achieved with cotton alone.

The fabric takes its name from traditional Japanese tabi textiles, historically produced from short-staple cotton grown in the Kojima region. These early fabrics were known for their rough, uneven texture, qualities intentionally echoed in this modern interpretation.

An off-white ecru base is accented by a pale pink selvedge edge in production, adding subtle contrast. A natural vegetable-tanned leather patch completes the fabric, allowing both denim and leather to age gracefully together.

product_name: Super Guy - MIJ15 - Hand Dyed Natural Indigo x Kakishibu Intangible Cultural Treasure Selvedge Denim
description_html:
This limited-edition release is part of our Made in Japan series, where we take the most traditional techniques, use the best materials we can get our hands on, and build everything with old-school construction. The MIJ15 is a 15oz selvedge denim, and the yarns are dyed using two ancient natural dyes, indigo and kakishibu.

The warp is dyed in Tokushima, on Shikoku Island, using a process that’s been around for hundreds of years. It’s such an important part of Japanese culture that it’s officially recognized as an Intangible Cultural Treasure. The yarns are bundled into hanks, dipped into natural indigo dye vats that are literally buried in the ground, then pulled out and oxidized in the open air. But because the yarn is bundled, some parts are exposed more than others. So what you get is uneven oxidation across the yarn, some parts darker, some lighter, and that creates a really rich, varied range of indigo shades across the fabric. This only happens with natural dye, and only when it’s done by hand. The weft is dyed with kakishibu, which is made from fermented persimmon. This dye’s been used in Japan for over a thousand years, and it gives the yarn a kind of burnt orange or brown tone that comes through the surface of the denim. The mix of that color underneath the indigo, plus the texture from the slubby yarns, gives this fabric so much dimension. It almost looks like it’s glowing in certain lighting.

The patch is real Shell Cordovan—dense horsehide that ages beautifully. And all the MIJ details are here: 100% iron buttons, copper rivets, raised belt loops, hidden back pocket rivets, selvedge fly, and the peekaboo selvedge on the coin pocket.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

description_html:
The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection is celebrating its 10th iteration with the return of a fan favorite: the iconic Okayama Spirit Selvedge. This marks the first time the original has been rereleased since it was first released in 2013.

The Okayama Spirit is a 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim that is dyed using the indigo rope dyeing process. In this process, cotton yarns are repeatedly run through vats of indigo dye, but not long enough for the dye to fully penetrate the yarn core. This creates a unique pattern in the fabric as thicker sections of the yarn absorb more indigo and thinner sections absorb less. The yarns themselves also have an irregular, slubby texture which adds to the overall texture of the fabric. To further enhance the texture, the denim is slowly woven on vintage shuttle looms, which creates a wavy weave pattern when viewed up close. The combination of the irregular slubby yarns and the loose weaving of the fabric gives it an organic, uneven grain that is signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured look.

To preserve the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel of this unsanforized denim, the MIJ10 undergoes a tempi treatment which shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture. This removes the guesswork from sizing and allows you to get the correct size from the start. The MIJ10 also features a range of finishing touches that add to its character and appeal. These include 100% iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. The jeans also feature a maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, a signature of the MIJ series.

The MIJ10 is made in Japan from start to finish, ensuring its high quality. The expert craftsmanship that goes into each pair is evident in the attention to detail and care taken at every stage of the production process, from the dyeing of the yarn, weaving of the fabric, to the cutting and sewing of the denim. 

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

The Dia De Los Muertos Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by Mexico’s vibrant Day of the Dead tradition. Woven in Okayama, Japan on vintage shuttle looms, it uses rope-dyed short slub yarns to create a textured surface that will develop dramatic, high-contrast vertical fades over time. His illustration depicts a skeleton guided to the underworld by a Xoloitzcuintli, the sacred Mexican hairless dog believed to escort souls to the afterlife.

The Printed Autumn Corduroy Seersucker is a 5oz Japanese fabric that blends two classic textile textures into one distinctive cloth. The corduroy element is created with fine vertical ridges, while the seersucker effect comes from weaving some yarns at a looser tension, causing the fabric to naturally pucker. Fun fact : seersucker dates back to colonial India, its name rooted in the Persian words for “milk and sugar,” referencing its smooth-and-rough contrast. This dual construction produces a highly textured surface that feels dimensional to the touch.

The lightweight 5oz weight makes it comfortable for year-round wear, while the printed autumn pattern adds seasonal character. The raised and recessed areas of the fabric interact with the print, giving it subtle depth and variation. Despite its visual complexity, the fabric is made from 100% cotton, offering breathability and softness.

Unlike most denim that undergoes singeing to remove surface fibers, this jean skips that finishing step so it retains a soft, slightly hairy surface beloved by denim enthusiasts.

The Flying Squirrel combines vintage-inspired texture, clean selvedge detailing and a comfortable fabric weight to deliver a standout jean that breaks in beautifully over time while remaining wearable across seasons.

The Kawataro Selvedge is a fresh greencast interpretation of our legendary Japan Heritage denim. It draws inspiration from Kawataro, the mischievous Japanese river God, also known as Kappa. Kappa is notoriously famous for his love of cucumbers, sumo wrestling, and playful trickery. Crafted from 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge denim, the Kawataro Selvedge features a distinctly slubby, uneven texture created through low-tension weaving and the use of irregularly-shaped slub yarns. The yarns are rope-dyed in indigo, and due to their unique shape, the dye penetrates unevenly thus resulting in varied absorption across the fabric. As the denim fades with wear, it reveals a striking spectrum of indigo shades, producing high-contrast, three-dimensional fades. Additional details include contrast stitching, a custom Raging Kong leather patch, pink selvedge ID, and antique copper buttons and rivets.

description_html:
The High Noon Selvedge is a 10oz lightweight Japanese Selvedge Denim, expertly woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. Inspired by the rugged durability of 1900s era jeans, it captures the essence of that period. Just like denim from that era, the High Noon Selvedge is unsanforized to preserve authenticity. However, each pair has undergone a rinse wash to soften the fabric, minimize shrinkage, and simplify sizing. A defining feature of unsanforized denim is the characteristic leg twist, where the side seams twist along the fabric's bias. This adds a distinctive character to each pair, showcasing the old-world methods prior to the development of anti-skewing techniques designed to eliminate such twists. The denim sports a warm, mid-toned indigo hue, reminiscent of vintage pieces, and is highlighted with a orange line selvedge ID. This lighter shade of indigo facilitates quicker fading, enabling you to achieve lighter, vintage-style fades much more rapidly. Designed for immediate comfort, the High Noon Selvedge is lightweight and soft, requiring no break-in period. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, button fly, a dark brown leather patch, and silver metallic hardware. 

The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
The Frankenstein Denim is a 14oz Japanese denim, intricately woven in an alternating twill pattern. True to its name, this denim is a mishmash of various construction details. The weave pattern alternates every 2 inches between left-hand twill and right-hand twill throughout the fabric. Since this denim does not adhere to a single twill direction, it cannot undergo anti-skewing, a traditional finishing process designed to eliminate the natural twist of the fabric. Consequently, the sections of left-hand and right-hand twill will twist along their bias over time, enhancing the fabric’s dynamic texture. Crafted with big slub yarns that alternate between thick and thin sections, this denim not only offers an incredible texture but also affects dye penetration during the rope dyeing process. This results in sections of the yarn fading at different rates, revealing a stunning spectrum of indigo hues as the denim ages. Made from 100% cotton, this denim offers a classic rigid raw denim feel. The jeans feature an upside-down leather patch—a distinctive hallmark found only in the Frankenstein Denim series. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware. 

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

product_name: True Guy - Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Sea Island Selvedge is a 12oz Japanese selvedge denim crafted from Virgin American Sea Island Cotton—the most luxurious denim we’ve ever produced. Sea Island Cotton is an ultra-rare Extra-Long Staple cotton. Renowned for its silky luster, uniform texture, cashmere-like softness, and exceptional durability, this cotton has a rich and storied past. Originally cultivated in the West Indies in the 1600s, it was once so coveted that British royalty tried to keep it exclusive. In the 1800s, seeds made their way to the American colonies, but a devastating beetle infestation nearly wiped it out in the 1920s.

Fast forward to 2015…. seeds that were tucked away in a seed vault are plated in Texas and New Mexico. This American-grown strain, genetically identical to the original variety, is now being used by select Japanese mills, including ours. Inspired by 1920s-era denim, this fabric offers a glimpse into an alternate history. What if Sea Island Cotton had become the standard? Imagine a world where silky-soft, ultra-durable jeans was the norm! Finishing details include contrast stitching, a durable paper patch, antique copper hardware, and a pink selvedge ID.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

product_name: Weird Guy - King Ghidorah: The Three-Headed Monster Denim
description_html:
Introducing the King Ghidorah Denim, a 14oz Japanese denim designed in tribute to one of Godzilla’s most formidable foes: the three-headed kaiju King Ghidorah, who made his debut in the 1964 film Ghidorah, the Three-Headed Monster. Known for his golden scales, hurricane winds, and gravity beams, King Ghidorah stands as a symbol of overwhelming extraterrestrial power.

The denim features a slubby 14oz fabric woven in Japan using a rare triple alternating weave, left-hand twill, right-hand twill, and broken twill, representing Ghidorah’s three independent heads. A gold weft mirrors the shimmering metallic color of his body, subtly visible through the twill lines of the indigo-dyed warp. The uneven texture enhances visual depth while promising strong fades with wear.

This denim is finished with a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch embossed and foil-stamped with licensed King Ghidorah® artwork, full-color Godzilla® poster print pocket bags, and a dual-branded woven label. Cut and sewn in our Canadian factory, the jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

Finished with a Horween Cavalier Ink Blue Chromexcel leather patch, the fabric pairs deep indigo with richly hued leather, both designed to age together.

product_name: Easy Guy - MIJ11 - Tokushima Hand Dyed Kakishibu Selvedge
description_html:
The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan 11 - a masterpiece showcasing the richness and depth of ancient Japanese dyeing techniques. The MIJ11 is hand-dyed using the natural and eco-friendly Kakishibu or persimmon dyeing technique. This laborious process involves dipping the yarns by hand in the Kakishibu dye and letting them dry under the sun. The slow weaving process on vintage shuttle looms creates an organic, uneven texture, resulting in a denim with a unique warm brown hue and subtle variation in color.

All the details of MIJ11 are designed to evolve with time. The iron buttons will rust and the copper rivets will oxidize to a beautiful green patina. The jeans also come with a sheepskin leather patch. Each pair is made with care and attention to detail, reflecting the skill and craftsmanship of the artisans who continue to practice this craft.

The MIJ11 is a stunning example of the Kakishibu dyeing technique and a beautiful reminder of the value of traditional practices- they are a symbol of a timeless craft, and a tribute to the beauty of imperfection.

The Easy Guy is a high-rise tapered fit with a relaxed top block and a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 14oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

product_name: Chore Coat  - Secret Agent Denim - Bleach Blue
description_html:
The Secret Agent Denim is a 14oz Japanese denim developed from a fabric that was nearly discarded. During development in Japan, an entire lot of denim was unintentionally sun-exposed, resulting in uneven coloration that made it unsuitable for standard production.

Rather than allowing the fabric to go to waste, the mill collaborated with a nearby Japanese dye house to carefully bleach the denim at the fabric stage. This process transformed the material into a pale, cloudy indigo with a soft, consistent finish. The fabric is received in this state and cut and sewn without any garment washing.

Despite the bleaching process, the denim retains substantial body and durability at 14oz, while offering improved drape and comfort from the start. Finished with a full-grain leather patch, Secret Agent Denim reflects a creative rescue that turns imperfection into character.

The Chore Coat is a classic workwear coat cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with two chest patch pockets and two roomy hip pockets.

product_name: True  Guy - MIJ14 - Haru Kaze Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ14 – Haru Kaze Selvedge marks the first lightweight denim in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan line. Weighing in at just 8.6oz, this denim is crafted in a 2x1 workwear style using lightweight slub yarn. The result is a fabric rich in neps on both the warp and weft sides.

Made from 100% recycled cotton, the interior weft is dyed brown, giving the denim a warm, inviting tone. This denim is loomstate, meaning it hasn't gone through conventional finishing processes like anti-skewing, singeing, or sanforization. This preserves the denim's natural hairy and slubby texture, and over time, the legs will twist—a hallmark of traditional denim craftsmanship. To manage shrinkage, the denim undergoes a tempi treatment—a soak and hang-dry process that eliminates shrinkage while maintaining the crispy raw feel.

Finishing touches include a sheepskin leather patch, 100% copper rivets with hidden back pocket rivets, and 100% iron buttons—hardware that will patina and age gracefully alongside the denim. Additionally, the signature Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan maple leaf embroidery is proudly featured on the back pocket.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • 8.6oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan

product_name: Weird Guy - The Cat’s Pyjamas Selvedge - Blue
description_html:
The Cat’s Pajamas Selvedge is an 8.5oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by early 20th-century workwear and 1920s reproduction fabrics. The name references period slang, when “the cat’s pajamas” was used to describe something exceptional, capturing the spirit of the era this fabric draws from.

Woven with a soft vintage indigo tone and a subtle beige weft, the fabric presents a warm, aged appearance that feels historically grounded rather than modern. A classic white selvedge edge reinforces its traditional construction.

While 8.5oz is considered lightweight today, early 1900s catalogs often marketed 9oz denim as “ultra heavyweight,” making this fabric a faithful interpretation of period-correct denim. Its lighter weight makes it especially suitable for spring and summer while maintaining structure and authenticity.

True to its historical reference, the fabric is finished with a reinforced paper patch rather than leather, reflecting the materials used before leather patches became standard. Tin buttons complete the reproduction-inspired detailing.

The Weird Guy is a regular tapered fit; medium rise, standard thigh and slight taper from the knee to hem

  • Reinforced paper patch

product_name: Denim Jacket  - Secret Agent Denim - Bleach Blue
description_html:
The Secret Agent Denim is a 14oz Japanese denim developed from a fabric that was nearly discarded. During development in Japan, an entire lot of denim was unintentionally sun-exposed, resulting in uneven coloration that made it unsuitable for standard production.

Rather than allowing the fabric to go to waste, the mill collaborated with a nearby Japanese dye house to carefully bleach the denim at the fabric stage. This process transformed the material into a pale, cloudy indigo with a soft, consistent finish. The fabric is received in this state and cut and sewn without any garment washing.

Despite the bleaching process, the denim retains substantial body and durability at 14oz, while offering improved drape and comfort from the start. Finished with a full-grain leather patch, Secret Agent Denim reflects a creative rescue that turns imperfection into character.

The Denim Jacket a classic denim jacket cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with slash front pockets, inner pocket bags, and chest flap pockets.
  • Secret Agent Denim - Bleach Blue
  • STYLE / FIT — Denim Jacket
  • 14oz Japanese Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Indigo (fabric bleached)
  • Full-grain leather patch
  • Made in Canada

description_html:
The Citrus Kasuri Weft Selvedge is a 14oz Japanese selvedge denim distinguished by its complex weft dyeing technique. Beneath the indigo surface lies a vibrant interior created using traditional Kasuri methods.

Rather than inserting solid-colored weft yarns, Kasuri dyeing involves binding and selectively dyeing sections of yarn before weaving. This results in alternating yellow and green segments along the same yarn, producing organic, patterned coloration rather than uniform stripes.

As the denim wears and abrasions develop, the citrus-toned weft gradually reveals itself through the indigo surface. Due to the labor-intensive nature of Kasuri dyeing, this fabric is used sparingly, making it both expressive and rare.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

product_name: Chore Coat - Tabi Selvedge - Off White
description_html:
The Tabi Selvedge is an 11.5oz Japanese selvedge denim woven from a blend of 75% cotton and 25% linen. The addition of linen introduces visible texture, with natural slub and seed flecks creating a tactile surface that cannot be achieved with cotton alone.

The fabric takes its name from traditional Japanese tabi textiles, historically produced from short-staple cotton grown in the Kojima region. These early fabrics were known for their rough, uneven texture, qualities intentionally echoed in this modern interpretation.

An off-white ecru base is accented by a pale pink selvedge edge in production, adding subtle contrast. A natural vegetable-tanned leather patch completes the fabric, allowing both denim and leather to age gracefully together.

The Chore Coat is a classic workwear coat cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with two chest patch pockets and two roomy hip pockets.

description_html:
The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection is celebrating its 10th iteration with the return of a fan favorite: the iconic Okayama Spirit Selvedge. This marks the first time the original has been rereleased since it was first released in 2013.

The Okayama Spirit is a 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim that is dyed using the indigo rope dyeing process. In this process, cotton yarns are repeatedly run through vats of indigo dye, but not long enough for the dye to fully penetrate the yarn core. This creates a unique pattern in the fabric as thicker sections of the yarn absorb more indigo and thinner sections absorb less. The yarns themselves also have an irregular, slubby texture which adds to the overall texture of the fabric. To further enhance the texture, the denim is slowly woven on vintage shuttle looms, which creates a wavy weave pattern when viewed up close. The combination of the irregular slubby yarns and the loose weaving of the fabric gives it an organic, uneven grain that is signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured look.

To preserve the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel of this unsanforized denim, the MIJ10 undergoes a tempi treatment which shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture. This removes the guesswork from sizing and allows you to get the correct size from the start. The MIJ10 also features a range of finishing touches that add to its character and appeal. These include 100% iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. The jeans also feature a maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, a signature of the MIJ series.

The MIJ10 is made in Japan from start to finish, ensuring its high quality. The expert craftsmanship that goes into each pair is evident in the attention to detail and care taken at every stage of the production process, from the dyeing of the yarn, weaving of the fabric, to the cutting and sewing of the denim. 

The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • MIJ10 - Okayama Spirit
  • STYLE / FIT — Super Guy
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101505000

product_name: Strong Guy - Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Sea Island Selvedge is a 12oz Japanese selvedge denim crafted from Virgin American Sea Island Cotton—the most luxurious denim we’ve ever produced. Sea Island Cotton is an ultra-rare Extra-Long Staple cotton. Renowned for its silky luster, uniform texture, cashmere-like softness, and exceptional durability, this cotton has a rich and storied past. Originally cultivated in the West Indies in the 1600s, it was once so coveted that British royalty tried to keep it exclusive. In the 1800s, seeds made their way to the American colonies, but a devastating beetle infestation nearly wiped it out in the 1920s.

Fast forward to 2015…. seeds that were tucked away in a seed vault are plated in Texas and New Mexico. This American-grown strain, genetically identical to the original variety, is now being used by select Japanese mills, including ours. Inspired by 1920s-era denim, this fabric offers a glimpse into an alternate history. What if Sea Island Cotton had become the standard? Imagine a world where silky-soft, ultra-durable jeans was the norm! Finishing details include contrast stitching, a durable paper patch, antique copper hardware, and a pink selvedge ID.

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

  • Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
  • STYLE / FIT — Strong Guy
  • 12oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

product_name: Easy Guy - Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Sea Island Selvedge is a 12oz Japanese selvedge denim crafted from Virgin American Sea Island Cotton—the most luxurious denim we’ve ever produced. Sea Island Cotton is an ultra-rare Extra-Long Staple cotton. Renowned for its silky luster, uniform texture, cashmere-like softness, and exceptional durability, this cotton has a rich and storied past. Originally cultivated in the West Indies in the 1600s, it was once so coveted that British royalty tried to keep it exclusive. In the 1800s, seeds made their way to the American colonies, but a devastating beetle infestation nearly wiped it out in the 1920s.

Fast forward to 2015…. seeds that were tucked away in a seed vault are plated in Texas and New Mexico. This American-grown strain, genetically identical to the original variety, is now being used by select Japanese mills, including ours. Inspired by 1920s-era denim, this fabric offers a glimpse into an alternate history. What if Sea Island Cotton had become the standard? Imagine a world where silky-soft, ultra-durable jeans was the norm! Finishing details include contrast stitching, a durable paper patch, antique copper hardware, and a pink selvedge ID.

The Easy Guy is a high-rise tapered fit with a relaxed top block and a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 12oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — 101132806

product_name: True Guy - Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Leatherface Selvedge is our Halloween release, built around one of the most legendary horror films of all time: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre (1974). Grainy, brutal, and stripped of polish, the movie still feels dangerous, like something that wasn’t supposed to make it to theaters. Its tension comes from what it withholds: there’s little blood, no music, and almost no dialogue from the killer. Just heat, noise, and panic.

This fabric is made with 100% Texas-grown cotton, It’s spun into a 14.5oz rope-dyed indigo selvedge denim with a pale yellow weft, echoing Leatherface’s worn butcher’s apron. The color isn’t bright or clean, it’s the muted, washed-out yellow you see in aged canvas under harsh light.

The selvedge ID is finished in silver and red, nodding to the chrome of the chainsaw and the violence it leaves behind. The fabric is woven in Japan on shuttle looms, giving it a rigid hand and vertical texture that will evolve with wear and fade with time.

Each pair includes a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch, embossed and foil-stamped with officially licensed Leatherface artwork. The pocket bags are fully printed in color with film stills from the original 1974 release. And the co-branded woven label pulls from an actual newspaper ad used to promote the movie’s theatrical run.

Every element was designed to feel true to the film.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — TCM144021

product_name: Heritage Denim Jacket - MIJ13 - Okayama Spirit Kuro
description_html:
Presenting the 'Okayama Spirit Kuro," the 13th edition of the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection. Taking inspiration from the original Okayama Spirit denim, this striking all-black silhouette is a seamless transformation - with "Kuro" meaning black in Japanese.

Crafted from 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim, the Okayama Spirit Kuro showcases a unique, uneven texture. The sulfur-dyed cotton yarns create an irregular tone, as the thicker sections absorb more dye while the thinner sections absorb less. When worn over time shades of black will fade to grey, creating an aesthetically pleasing uneven tone that gracefully fades at different rates, attributing to the unique look of this denim.  Enhanced by the slow weaving on vintage shuttle looms, the wavy weave pattern contributes to the denim's organic, uneven grain - a signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured appearance.

The Okayama Spirit Kuro Black undergoes a tempi treatment to preserve its hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture, ensuring you can select the perfect size from the start. The Okayama Spirit Kuro also boasts a host of finishing touches that enhance its character, including blacked-out iron capped buttons that rust, a black deerskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge placket. A maple leaf embroidered on the chest pocket is a signature touch of the MIJ series.  

Every aspect of the Okayama Spirit Kuro is meticulously crafted in Japan, guaranteeing its superior quality. The expert craftsmanship behind each pair is evident in the intricate details and care taken throughout the entire production process, from dyeing the yarn and weaving the fabric to cutting and sewing the denim.

The Heritage Jacket pays homage to old type denim jackets capturing the essence of vintage style.  It features a pleated front, flap chest pockets and adjustable rear buttons to ensure the perfect fit.

  • STYLE / FIT — Heritage Denim Jacket
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan

description_html:
The Citrus Kasuri Weft Selvedge is a 14oz Japanese selvedge denim distinguished by its complex weft dyeing technique. Beneath the indigo surface lies a vibrant interior created using traditional Kasuri methods.

Rather than inserting solid-colored weft yarns, Kasuri dyeing involves binding and selectively dyeing sections of yarn before weaving. This results in alternating yellow and green segments along the same yarn, producing organic, patterned coloration rather than uniform stripes.

As the denim wears and abrasions develop, the citrus-toned weft gradually reveals itself through the indigo surface. Due to the labor-intensive nature of Kasuri dyeing, this fabric is used sparingly, making it both expressive and rare.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • Indigo warp
  • Yellow and green Kasuri-dyed weft
  • Natural vegetable-tanned leather patch

product_name: Strong Guy - Fat Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Fat Fox Selvedge, a 22.7oz Japanese duck canvas made entirely from organic FoxFibre cotton, grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This fabric contains no dyes, bleach or chemical coloration. The warm brown color comes directly from the naturally pigmented cotton plant.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown and tan cotton varieties with long-staple white cotton to create spinnable, naturally colored fiber suitable for commercial weaving. Her work eliminates the need for conventional dyeing and greatly reduces the environmental impact associated with textile production. 

Woven in Japan as a heavyweight selvedge canvas, the fabric is constructed using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown FoxFibre weft yarns. At 22.7oz per square yard, it pushes the limits of traditional duck canvas, creating a dense, structured fabric that softens and molds with wear. Natural seed flecks remain visible throughout the yarn, adding texture and depth. Over time, the color deepens with washing and sunlight, developing a patina unique to naturally colored cotton.

The Fat Fox Selvedge is finished with components chosen to highlight the fabric’s natural character, including 100 percent FoxFibre warp and weft, natural ecru pocket bags with visible seed flecks, a natural vegetable tanned leather patch that is chromium free and dye free, a pink selvedge ID for a subtle contrast detail, and antique tone hardware selected to complement the palette.

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

  • Fat Fox Selvedge - Brown
  • STYLE / FIT — Strong Guy
  • 22.7oz Japanese Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada

description_html:
The Real Gold Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim made with cotton and just a hint of real gold, giving the selvedge ID a golden shine! The denim itself features a classic rigid raw denim look and feel, made with short slub yarns that add depth to the fabric. As the denim fades, these short slub yarns create vertical highlights throughout. While the denim is classic, the selvedge ID is anything but—it features an 18k gold yarn custom spun for Naked & Famous Denim. This gold detail is prominently featured on the exposed selvedge coin pocket and the selvedge outseam when you flip up your cuff. The jeans boast classic finishing details, including contrast stitching, a button fly, silver metallic hardware, and a natural veg-tan leather patch. Each pair is proudly crafted in our Canadian factory.

The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

product_name: Easy Guy -  Brown Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Brown Fox Selvedge, a 13oz Japanese selvedge denim made entirely from organic FoxFibre® cotton—grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This denim contains no dyes or bleach. The brown color comes directly from the cotton plant itself.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown cotton varieties with white Pima to create long-staple, naturally pigmented cotton that could be commercially spun. Her work eliminated the need for chemical dyes, significantly reducing the environmental impact of textile production. The FoxFibre® used in this denim is grown using regenerative organic farming methods, making it one of the most sustainable cotton sources available.

The denim is woven in Okayama, Japan, and spun in Osaka, using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown weft yarns. The result is a warm, earthy-toned fabric with subtle surface variation and a soft hand. Over time, the fabric darkens and develops a rich patina with wear and washing.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

  • Brown Fox Selvedge - Brown
  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 13oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Organic FoxFibre® Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — 101133106

product_name: True Shirt - Corduroy Shirting (21W) - Brown / Beige
description_html:
The Corduroy Shirting is a lightweight 4.5oz Japanese fabric featuring a fine 21-wale construction, meaning it has 21 ridges (or “wales”) per inch for a delicate, velvety nap. Lightweight corduroy like this was popularized in England in the 18th century, evolving from rough Egyptian fustian and once referred to as “cord du roi” or “the king’s cord,” worn by nobility.

Adding to its character, the reverse side of the fabric features a check pattern, giving the garment a hidden detail that speaks to the craftsmanship behind the material. The fine wale texture provides visual richness without the bulk of heavier corduroy, making it comfortable for year-round wear.

The True Shirt is a classic button-up that fits nice and easy, and features a straight hem for an effortless, casual look.

product_name: Weird Guy - MIJ14 - Haru Kaze Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ14 – Haru Kaze Selvedge marks the first lightweight denim in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan line. Weighing in at just 8.6oz, this denim is crafted in a 2x1 workwear style using lightweight slub yarn. The result is a fabric rich in neps on both the warp and weft sides.

Made from 100% recycled cotton, the interior weft is dyed brown, giving the denim a warm, inviting tone. This denim is loomstate, meaning it hasn't gone through conventional finishing processes like anti-skewing, singeing, or sanforization. This preserves the denim's natural hairy and slubby texture, and over time, the legs will twist—a hallmark of traditional denim craftsmanship. To manage shrinkage, the denim undergoes a tempi treatment—a soak and hang-dry process that eliminates shrinkage while maintaining the crispy raw feel.

Finishing touches include a sheepskin leather patch, 100% copper rivets with hidden back pocket rivets, and 100% iron buttons—hardware that will patina and age gracefully alongside the denim. Additionally, the signature Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan maple leaf embroidery is proudly featured on the back pocket.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101129003

product_name: Easy Guy - MIJ13 - Okayama Spirit Kuro
description_html:
Presenting the 'Okayama Spirit Kuro," the 13th edition of the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection. Taking inspiration from the original Okayama Spirit denim, this striking all-black silhouette is a seamless transformation - with "Kuro" meaning black in Japanese.

Crafted from 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim, the Okayama Spirit Kuro showcases a unique, uneven texture. The sulfur-dyed cotton yarns create an irregular tone, as the thicker sections absorb more dye while the thinner sections absorb less. When worn over time shades of black will fade to grey, creating an aesthetically pleasing uneven tone that gracefully fades at different rates, attributing to the unique look of this denim.  Enhanced by the slow weaving on vintage shuttle looms, the wavy weave pattern contributes to the denim's organic, uneven grain - a signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured appearance.

The Okayama Spirit Kuro Black undergoes a tempi treatment to preserve its hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture, ensuring you can select the perfect size from the start. The Okayama Spirit Kuro also boasts a host of finishing touches that enhance its character, including blacked-out iron capped buttons that rust, copper rivets that oxidize, raised belt loops that fade, a black deerskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. A maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket is a signature touch of the MIJ series.  

Every aspect of the Okayama Spirit Kuro is meticulously crafted in Japan, guaranteeing its superior quality. The expert craftsmanship behind each pair is evident in the intricate details and care taken throughout the entire production process, from dyeing the yarn and weaving the fabric to cutting and sewing the denim.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • MIJ13 - Okayama Spirit Kuro
  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101505506

product_name: Denim Jacket - MIJ9 - "Tennen Ai" Natural Indigo Slub Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ 9 - "Tennen Ai" Natural Indigo Selvedge is a 15oz Japanese selvedge denim made using 2 kinds of natural indigo dyed yarns. Natural indigo dye is produced in a fermentation process of the Indigofera plant that can take up to 1 year. Unlike synthetic indigo, with natural there is a great deal of color variation from one dye lot to another. For this denim 2 different batches of natural indigo were used to rope dye the cotton yarns. Once woven the result is a denim that has a hand dyed yarn look, as a spectrum of indigo yarns run vertically across the fabric. The denim is unsanforized but tempi treated, which shrinks the fabric but protects the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. These jeans are made in Japan and feature real iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, the MIJ maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, peek-a-boo selvedge coin pocket, micro busted out seam, and a selvedge button fly. Dyed, woven, cut, sewn, built in Japan.

The Denim Jacket is a classic denim jacket cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with two chest flap pockets, two front slash pockets, and two large interior pockets.

description_html:
The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection is celebrating its 10th iteration with the return of a fan favorite: the iconic Okayama Spirit Selvedge. This marks the first time the original has been rereleased since it was first released in 2013.

The Okayama Spirit is a 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim that is dyed using the indigo rope dyeing process. In this process, cotton yarns are repeatedly run through vats of indigo dye, but not long enough for the dye to fully penetrate the yarn core. This creates a unique pattern in the fabric as thicker sections of the yarn absorb more indigo and thinner sections absorb less. The yarns themselves also have an irregular, slubby texture which adds to the overall texture of the fabric. To further enhance the texture, the denim is slowly woven on vintage shuttle looms, which creates a wavy weave pattern when viewed up close. The combination of the irregular slubby yarns and the loose weaving of the fabric gives it an organic, uneven grain that is signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured look.

To preserve the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel of this unsanforized denim, the MIJ10 undergoes a tempi treatment which shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture. This removes the guesswork from sizing and allows you to get the correct size from the start. The MIJ10 also features a range of finishing touches that add to its character and appeal. These include 100% iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. The jeans also feature a maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, a signature of the MIJ series.

The MIJ10 is made in Japan from start to finish, ensuring its high quality. The expert craftsmanship that goes into each pair is evident in the attention to detail and care taken at every stage of the production process, from the dyeing of the yarn, weaving of the fabric, to the cutting and sewing of the denim. 

The Denim Jacket is a classic denim jacket cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with two chest flap pockets, two front slash pockets, and two large interior pockets.

Crafted from 16oz Japanese Selvedge denim, the Giant Hornet Selvedge features a gritty, short-slub texture produced through low-tension weaving and the use of irregular yarns that create a rugged, uneven surface. Finishing details include contrast stitching, a yellow hair-on leather patch, silver metallic hardware, and a distinctive yellow and black selvedge ID that ties the entire theme together.

product_name: Super Guy - Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Sea Island Selvedge is a 12oz Japanese selvedge denim crafted from Virgin American Sea Island Cotton—the most luxurious denim we’ve ever produced. Sea Island Cotton is an ultra-rare Extra-Long Staple cotton. Renowned for its silky luster, uniform texture, cashmere-like softness, and exceptional durability, this cotton has a rich and storied past. Originally cultivated in the West Indies in the 1600s, it was once so coveted that British royalty tried to keep it exclusive. In the 1800s, seeds made their way to the American colonies, but a devastating beetle infestation nearly wiped it out in the 1920s.

Fast forward to 2015…. seeds that were tucked away in a seed vault are plated in Texas and New Mexico. This American-grown strain, genetically identical to the original variety, is now being used by select Japanese mills, including ours. Inspired by 1920s-era denim, this fabric offers a glimpse into an alternate history. What if Sea Island Cotton had become the standard? Imagine a world where silky-soft, ultra-durable jeans was the norm! Finishing details include contrast stitching, a durable paper patch, antique copper hardware, and a pink selvedge ID.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

  • Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
  • STYLE / FIT — Super Guy
  • 12oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — 101132800

product_name: Strong Guy - Tabi Selvedge - Off White
description_html:
The Tabi Selvedge is an 11.5oz Japanese selvedge denim woven from a blend of 75% cotton and 25% linen. The addition of linen introduces visible texture, with natural slub and seed flecks creating a tactile surface that cannot be achieved with cotton alone.

The fabric takes its name from traditional Japanese tabi textiles, historically produced from short-staple cotton grown in the Kojima region. These early fabrics were known for their rough, uneven texture, qualities intentionally echoed in this modern interpretation.

An off-white ecru base is accented by a pale pink selvedge edge in production, adding subtle contrast. A natural vegetable-tanned leather patch completes the fabric, allowing both denim and leather to age gracefully together.

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.
