description_html:
The Frankenstein Denim is a 14oz Japanese denim, intricately woven in an alternating twill pattern. True to its name, this denim is a mishmash of various construction details. The weave pattern alternates every 2 inches between left-hand twill and right-hand twill throughout the fabric. Since this denim does not adhere to a single twill direction, it cannot undergo anti-skewing, a traditional finishing process designed to eliminate the natural twist of the fabric. Consequently, the sections of left-hand and right-hand twill will twist along their bias over time, enhancing the fabric’s dynamic texture. Crafted with big slub yarns that alternate between thick and thin sections, this denim not only offers an incredible texture but also affects dye penetration during the rope dyeing process. This results in sections of the yarn fading at different rates, revealing a stunning spectrum of indigo hues as the denim ages. Made from 100% cotton, this denim offers a classic rigid raw denim feel. The jeans feature an upside-down leather patch—a distinctive hallmark found only in the Frankenstein Denim series. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware. 

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • Revival Frankenstein Denim
  • STYLE / FIT — Weird Guy
  • 14oz Japanese Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly

description_html:
Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.

There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.

Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.

To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.

The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, and selvedge fly. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.

Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • MIJ12 - Aomidori Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101056621

Note: The True Guy features a standard selvedge out seam and not the micro out seam detail as seen in other MIJ models.

description_html:
Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.

There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.

Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.

To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.

The jacket also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, and a selvedge placket. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the front pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.

Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.

The Denim Jacket is a classic denim jacket cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with two chest flap pockets, two front slash pockets, and two large interior pockets.

  • MIJ12 - Aomidori Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — Denim Jacket
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 164056664

description_html:
The Chocolate Milk Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim made from a distinctive blend of 77% cotton and 23% milk protein fiber derived from casein. The milk protein is processed into fiber through a liquid solution and spinneret extrusion before being spun into yarn and blended with cotton.

The brown-toned weft is carefully matched to the color of chocolate milk, subtly visible beneath the indigo surface and becoming more pronounced as the denim fades. This interaction creates depth and warmth that evolves naturally with wear.

A red-and-white twisted selvedge edge references the striped paper straws commonly seen in vintage chocolate milk advertisements. Cow-print pocket bags and a hair-on-hide leather patch complete the concept, balancing technical novelty with playful detail.

The Weird Guy is a regular tapered fit; medium rise, standard thigh and slight taper from the knee to hem

  • 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 77% Cotton / 23% Milk Protein Fiber
  • Indigo

  • Hair-on-hide leather patch
  • Made in Canada

description_html:
Introducing the Indigo Sashiko, a 12.5oz indigo rope-dyed Japanese twill, woven with a raised running stitch pattern reminiscent of Judo uniforms. This fabric is highly textured, with the running stitches prominently raised above the base fabric. Inspired by the rigorous demands of Judo, which focuses on grabs and throws, the textured and grippy surface of this fabric provides an ideal base for indigo dye. As the raised portions of the stitches fade at slightly different rates than the base fabric, they create a beautifully nuanced fade pattern. This fabric was woven on a special jacquard loom, capable of creating complex patterns. Made from 100% cotton, this fabric offers a soft hand feel. Each jacket is proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, featuring tonal stitching, black non-reflective hardware, and a deep navy leather patch.

The Kimono shirt, crafted as a modern tribute to the rich heritage of Japan, draws its design from the traditional Japanese noragi, historically worn by laborers. This jacket seamlessly blends cultural authenticity with contemporary fashion.

description_html:
The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection is celebrating its 10th iteration with the return of a fan favorite: the iconic Okayama Spirit Selvedge. This marks the first time the original has been rereleased since it was first released in 2013.

The Okayama Spirit is a 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim that is dyed using the indigo rope dyeing process. In this process, cotton yarns are repeatedly run through vats of indigo dye, but not long enough for the dye to fully penetrate the yarn core. This creates a unique pattern in the fabric as thicker sections of the yarn absorb more indigo and thinner sections absorb less. The yarns themselves also have an irregular, slubby texture which adds to the overall texture of the fabric. To further enhance the texture, the denim is slowly woven on vintage shuttle looms, which creates a wavy weave pattern when viewed up close. The combination of the irregular slubby yarns and the loose weaving of the fabric gives it an organic, uneven grain that is signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured look.

To preserve the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel of this unsanforized denim, the MIJ10 undergoes a tempi treatment which shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture. This removes the guesswork from sizing and allows you to get the correct size from the start. The MIJ10 also features a range of finishing touches that add to its character and appeal. These include 100% iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. The jeans also feature a maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, a signature of the MIJ series.

The MIJ10 is made in Japan from start to finish, ensuring its high quality. The expert craftsmanship that goes into each pair is evident in the attention to detail and care taken at every stage of the production process, from the dyeing of the yarn, weaving of the fabric, to the cutting and sewing of the denim. 

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • MIJ10 - Okayama Spirit
  • STYLE / FIT — Weird Guy
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101505003

Woven in Japan using rope-dyed black warp yarns and undyed white weft yarns, the fabric has pronounced grain and a heavyweight hand that develops high-contrast fades over time. The black-and-white selvedge ID reinforces the original visual tone.

Finished with a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch embossed and foil-stamped with classic 1954 Godzilla® artwork, black-and-white film-poster printed pocket bags, and a dual-branded woven label, all made in Canada with contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.

description_html:
The MIJ16 Genseki Selvedge is a 19oz unsanforized Japanese selvedge denim developed for maximum texture and character. Genseki translates to “raw ore,” a term used to describe unrefined stone in its natural, extracted state. The name reflects the fabric perfectly. Dense, rough, and heavily textured, this denim feels raw and elemental. Woven using slubby and neppy yarns, the fabric displays an intense, irregular surface with visible neps throughout. This yarn character is amplified through low-tension weaving, allowing the fibers to relax and shift on the loom. An earthy-toned weft adds warmth beneath the indigo warp, enhancing contrast and depth as the denim ages.

To preserve the denim’s hairiness, rough texture, and unsanforized character, the MIJ16 undergoes a Tempi treatment. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its raw surface and structural integrity, removing guesswork from sizing while keeping the denim true to its original feel.

The selvedge edge features an indigo–red–indigo micro-busted line. The narrower selvedge width allows the warp color to extend closer to the edge, with a fine red line providing subtle contrast.

The MIJ16 is finished with a full suite of Made in Japan details, including 100% iron buttons that will rust over time, 100% copper rivets that will oxidize, and raised belt loops designed to fade with wear. A Japanese sheepskin leather patch featuring the “Flower of Carnage” logo anchors the back, while functional details include a selvedge button fly, peekaboo selvedge coin pocket, two-tone stitching, and a chainstitched hem. A maple leaf embroidery on the back pocket completes the MIJ signature.

The MIJ16 is made in Japan from start to finish, from yarn preparation and dyeing to weaving, cutting, and sewing.

In terms of aging and fade potential, the MIJ16 stands alongside the most celebrated MIJ releases. Expect high-contrast fades, deep creasing, and dramatic texture evolution over time. If you’re familiar with the fade performance of the MIJ10, the MIJ16 delivers a similarly intense transformation, with even greater surface complexity.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

product_name: Easy Guy - Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Leatherface Selvedge is our Halloween release, built around one of the most legendary horror films of all time: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre (1974). Grainy, brutal, and stripped of polish, the movie still feels dangerous, like something that wasn’t supposed to make it to theaters. Its tension comes from what it withholds: there’s little blood, no music, and almost no dialogue from the killer. Just heat, noise, and panic.

This fabric is made with 100% Texas-grown cotton, It’s spun into a 14.5oz rope-dyed indigo selvedge denim with a pale yellow weft, echoing Leatherface’s worn butcher’s apron. The color isn’t bright or clean, it’s the muted, washed-out yellow you see in aged canvas under harsh light.

The selvedge ID is finished in silver and red, nodding to the chrome of the chainsaw and the violence it leaves behind. The fabric is woven in Japan on shuttle looms, giving it a rigid hand and vertical texture that will evolve with wear and fade with time.

Each pair includes a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch, embossed and foil-stamped with officially licensed Leatherface artwork. The pocket bags are fully printed in color with film stills from the original 1974 release. And the co-branded woven label pulls from an actual newspaper ad used to promote the movie’s theatrical run.

Every element was designed to feel true to the film.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada

description_html:
The High Noon Selvedge is a 10oz lightweight Japanese Selvedge Denim, expertly woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. Inspired by the rugged durability of 1900s era jeans, it captures the essence of that period. Just like denim from that era, the High Noon Selvedge is unsanforized to preserve authenticity. However, each pair has undergone a rinse wash to soften the fabric, minimize shrinkage, and simplify sizing. A defining feature of unsanforized denim is the characteristic leg twist, where the side seams twist along the fabric's bias. This adds a distinctive character to each pair, showcasing the old-world methods prior to the development of anti-skewing techniques designed to eliminate such twists. The denim sports a warm, mid-toned indigo hue, reminiscent of vintage pieces, and is highlighted with a orange line selvedge ID. This lighter shade of indigo facilitates quicker fading, enabling you to achieve lighter, vintage-style fades much more rapidly. Designed for immediate comfort, the High Noon Selvedge is lightweight and soft, requiring no break-in period. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, button fly, a dark brown leather patch, and silver metallic hardware. 

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • High Noon Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 10oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

description_html:
The Kawataro Selvedge is a fresh greencast interpretation of our legendary Japan Heritage denim. It draws inspiration from Kawataro, the mischievous Japanese river God, also known as Kappa. Kappa is notoriously famous for his love of cucumbers, sumo wrestling, and playful trickery. Crafted from 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge denim, the Kawataro Selvedge features a distinctly slubby, uneven texture created through low-tension weaving and the use of irregularly-shaped slub yarns. The yarns are rope-dyed in indigo, and due to their unique shape, the dye penetrates unevenly thus resulting in varied absorption across the fabric. As the denim fades with wear, it reveals a striking spectrum of indigo shades, producing high-contrast, three-dimensional fades. Additional details include contrast stitching, a custom Raging Kong leather patch, pink selvedge ID, and antique copper buttons and rivets.

The Weird Guy is a regular tapered fit; medium rise, standard thigh and slight taper from the knee to hem.

product_name: Strong Guy - Secret Agent Denim - Bleach Blue
description_html:
The Secret Agent Denim is a 14oz Japanese denim developed from a fabric that was nearly discarded. During development in Japan, an entire lot of denim was unintentionally sun-exposed, resulting in uneven coloration that made it unsuitable for standard production.

Rather than allowing the fabric to go to waste, the mill collaborated with a nearby Japanese dye house to carefully bleach the denim at the fabric stage. This process transformed the material into a pale, cloudy indigo with a soft, consistent finish. The fabric is received in this state and cut and sewn without any garment washing.

Despite the bleaching process, the denim retains substantial body and durability at 14oz, while offering improved drape and comfort from the start. Finished with a full-grain leather patch, Secret Agent Denim reflects a creative rescue that turns imperfection into character.

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

  • STYLE / FIT — Strong Guy
  • 14oz Japanese Denim
  • 100% Cotton

  • Full-grain leather patch
  • Made in Canada

product_name: Denim Jacket  - MIJ13 - Okayama Spirit Kuro
description_html:
Presenting the 'Okayama Spirit Kuro," the 13th edition of the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection. Taking inspiration from the original Okayama Spirit denim, this striking all-black silhouette is a seamless transformation - with "Kuro" meaning black in Japanese.

Crafted from 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim, the Okayama Spirit Kuro showcases a unique, uneven texture. The sulfur-dyed cotton yarns create an irregular tone, as the thicker sections absorb more dye while the thinner sections absorb less. When worn over time shades of black will fade to grey, creating an aesthetically pleasing uneven tone that gracefully fades at different rates, attributing to the unique look of this denim.  Enhanced by the slow weaving on vintage shuttle looms, the wavy weave pattern contributes to the denim's organic, uneven grain - a signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured appearance.

The Okayama Spirit Kuro Black undergoes a tempi treatment to preserve its hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture, ensuring you can select the perfect size from the start. The Okayama Spirit Kuro also boasts a host of finishing touches that enhance its character, including blacked-out iron capped buttons that rust, a black deerskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge placket. A maple leaf embroidered on the chest pocket is a signature touch of the MIJ series.  

Every aspect of the Okayama Spirit Kuro is meticulously crafted in Japan, guaranteeing its superior quality. The expert craftsmanship behind each pair is evident in the intricate details and care taken throughout the entire production process, from dyeing the yarn and weaving the fabric to cutting and sewing the denim.

The Denim Jacket is a classic denim jacket cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with two chest flap pockets, two front slash pockets, and two large interior pockets.

description_html:
The Leatherface Selvedge is our Halloween release, built around one of the most legendary horror films of all time: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre (1974). Grainy, brutal, and stripped of polish, the movie still feels dangerous, like something that wasn’t supposed to make it to theaters. Its tension comes from what it withholds: there’s little blood, no music, and almost no dialogue from the killer. Just heat, noise, and panic.

This fabric is made with 100% Texas-grown cotton, It’s spun into a 14.5oz rope-dyed indigo selvedge denim with a pale yellow weft, echoing Leatherface’s worn butcher’s apron. The color isn’t bright or clean, it’s the muted, washed-out yellow you see in aged canvas under harsh light.

The selvedge ID is finished in silver and red, nodding to the chrome of the chainsaw and the violence it leaves behind. The fabric is woven in Japan on shuttle looms, giving it a rigid hand and vertical texture that will evolve with wear and fade with time.

Each pair includes a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch, embossed and foil-stamped with officially licensed Leatherface artwork. The pocket bags are fully printed in color with film stills from the original 1974 release. And the co-branded woven label pulls from an actual newspaper ad used to promote the movie’s theatrical run.

Every element was designed to feel true to the film.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

  • Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
  • STYLE / FIT — Super Guy
  • 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — TCM144000

description_html:
The 10 Fold Selvedge is a 14oz Japanese selvedge denim crafted from a unique blend of 10 varieties of cotton, sourced from 10 different countries, and featuring a distinctive 10-color selvedge ID. Originally produced for the 10th anniversary of Naked & Famous Denim, we had some unused rolls from the initial production that we saved for the perfect moment to re-release this fabric. This denim has a classic rigid raw feel, made with short slub yarns that add a subtle touch of character while preserving a traditional raw denim experience. Flip the cuff to reveal the multicolor selvedge ID. The jeans boast classic finishing details, including contrast stitching, a button fly, silver metallic hardware, and a natural veg-tan leather patch. Each pair is proudly crafted in our Canadian factory.

The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
Introducing the Forever Black Selvedge, a 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim, uniquely dyed with a permanent reactive dye to secure a lasting dark black color. Unlike traditional raw denim, where only the surface of the exterior warp yarns is dyed—leaving the core white—the yarns in the Forever Black Selvedge are thoroughly dyed through to the core. This process ensures that even with extensive wear, fading is significantly minimized, perfect for those who appreciate the enduring appeal of sleek black denim. Crafted from 100% cotton, this denim delivers a classic rigid raw denim feel. Each pair is proudly made in our Canadian factory, and is designed with tonal stitching, a button fly, black non-reflective hardware, and a black leather patch, creating a stealthy and clean aesthetic. 

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy

The Yatagarasu Selvedge is a 15oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by Yatagarasu, the mythical three-legged crow and revered Shinto God of guidance. This denim features a sulfur-dyed black warp that delivers a deep, rich tone from the outset. As the denim wears in, the contrasting white weft begins to emerge, creating dynamic, high-contrast fades unique to each wearer. Key details include tonal stitching, black pocket bags, pink selvedge ID, and black military spec copper buttons and rivets. The standout natural vegetable-tanned leather patch featuring metallic black foil artwork by renowned Canadian artist Jacqui Oakley, adds a powerful visual element to this mythologically-inspired piece.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

description_html:
Final release from our Godzilla® collection.

Named after the Japanese word for sludge, slime, or smog, Hedorah™ is the infamous Smog Monster first introduced in the 1971 cult classic Godzilla vs. Hedorah. Unlike any other kaiju, Hedorah™ represents the horrors of urban pollution and toxic waste, a living embodiment of industrial decay.

This jean draws directly from that dark iconography. Hedorah™’s grotesque, evolving forms, polluted atmosphere, and deeply unsettling presence are translated into denim, resulting in one of the most visually striking and unconventional antagonists in the Godzilla universe.

For this release, we selected a 15oz slubby black on black unsanforized Japanese selvedge denim to echo the Smog Monster itself. Dense, irregular, and heavy with character, the fabric features pronounced slubs and a deep, polluted black tone that reveals deeper texture and contrast with wear.

This is the smallest production run of all Godzilla® jeans, making it the most limited release in the collection.

Godzilla® and Hedorah™ are trademarks of Toho Co., Ltd. Used under license.

  • Hedorah Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 15oz 100% cotton Japanese selvedge denim with a dark, sludge-like surface
  • Dual-branded woven label
  • Natural vegetable-tanned leather patch with black foil-embossed Hedorah™ artwork by Canadian artist Jacqui Oakley
  • Full-color Godzilla® movie poster pocket bags
  • White / Pink / White selvedge edge
  • Black military hardware
  • Made in Canada

The Selvedge Hickory is a Japanese selvedge fabric woven from 100% cotton at 10oz on traditional shuttle looms. Featuring bold vertical indigo hickory stripes and a clean selvedge edge, the fabric draws directly from classic railroad and workwear uniforms.

The shuttle-loom construction gives the fabric a firm, structured hand that softens with wear while preserving its crisp striped appearance and heritage character.

Other details include natural low-contrast stitching, a 5oz natural vegetable-tanned leather patch, a clean white selvedge edge, and tin hardware selected for an authentic, traditional finish.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

product_name: True Guy - Coffee Dye Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Coffee Dye Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim that pairs a classic indigo-dyed warp with a truly unique twist - a weft dyed using certified Japanese organic medium roast coffee. The result is a rich, earthy undertone that subtly reveals itself as the denim fades, adding depth and warmth to the fabric’s character. This sustainable and innovative dyeing method not only reduces chemical use but also brings a distinctive hue and story to the denim. Finishing details include contrast stitching, a coffee-inspired milky brown/beige leather patch, silver metallic hardware, and a custom selvedge ID featuring a coffee/red/coffee color scheme - an homage to your favorite morning ritual. 

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

description_html:
The Gateway Selvedge is a 14.3oz Japanese selvedge denim that blends tradition with comfort, featuring 2% stretch for a more accessible raw denim experience. Woven with shorter staple cotton in the warp, this fabric has a gritty, textured surface that embodies the rugged character of classic raw denim. But with 2% elastane in the weft, it offers flexibility and eliminates the typical break-in period, making it the perfect entry point for those new to raw denim. You get the look and feel of rigid denim, with the added comfort of stretch that lasts all day. Key details include contrast stitching, a custom Raging Bull leather patch, pink selvedge ID, exposed selvedge coin pocket, and silver metallic buttons and rivets.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

description_html:
The Maekake Dobby is a 12.2oz Japanese dobby fabric inspired by traditional maekake aprons worn by sake merchants and laborers. Historically, these aprons were woven densely to protect against sharp tools, heat, and heavy use.

This modern interpretation maintains that dense structure while being fabric-rinsed to enhance softness and comfort from first wear. The rinse treatment also highlights the fabric’s layered indigo tones, allowing subtle gradients to emerge over time.

Finished with a Horween Cavalier Ink Blue Chromexcel leather patch, the fabric pairs deep indigo with richly hued leather, both designed to age together.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

product_name: Super Guy - Wax Coated Black Stretch
description_html:
The Wax Coated Black Stretch is a 12oz black Japanese power stretch denim, woven in a right hand twill construction. The denim is dyed black on both the warp and weft for a solid black color tone. A paraffin wax coating is then applied to give the fabric a leather like shine. The dye is resistant to fading to ensure the jeans stay blacker longer. The denim is made with 2% stretch for increased comfort, and has an incredible stretch recovery performance allowing the jeans to snap back to shape wear after wear. Other details include tonal stitching, full grain black leather patch, black metal waist button and rivets. The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

description_html:
The Maekake Dobby is a 12.2oz Japanese dobby fabric inspired by traditional maekake aprons worn by sake merchants and laborers. Historically, these aprons were woven densely to protect against sharp tools, heat, and heavy use.

This modern interpretation maintains that dense structure while being fabric-rinsed to enhance softness and comfort from first wear. The rinse treatment also highlights the fabric’s layered indigo tones, allowing subtle gradients to emerge over time.

Finished with a Horween Cavalier Ink Blue Chromexcel leather patch, the fabric pairs deep indigo with richly hued leather, both designed to age together.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
Introducing the 1954 Godzilla Selvedge, a 16oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by the original Godzilla film from 1954. Shot in stark black-and-white, the movie blended realism and symbolism and it’s here where the legend began. This denim mirrors that aesthetic with a black warp and white weft construction and slubby texture that evokes Godzilla’s scaled skin.

Woven in Japan using rope-dyed black warp yarns and undyed white weft yarns, the fabric has pronounced grain and a heavyweight hand that develops high-contrast fades over time. The black-and-white selvedge ID reinforces the original visual tone.

Finished with a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch embossed and foil-stamped with classic 1954 Godzilla® artwork, black-and-white film-poster printed pocket bags, and a dual-branded woven label, all made in Canada with contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
The Kawataro Selvedge is a fresh greencast interpretation of our legendary Japan Heritage denim. It draws inspiration from Kawataro, the mischievous Japanese river God, also known as Kappa. Kappa is notoriously famous for his love of cucumbers, sumo wrestling, and playful trickery. Crafted from 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge denim, the Kawataro Selvedge features a distinctly slubby, uneven texture created through low-tension weaving and the use of irregularly-shaped slub yarns. The yarns are rope-dyed in indigo, and due to their unique shape, the dye penetrates unevenly thus resulting in varied absorption across the fabric. As the denim fades with wear, it reveals a striking spectrum of indigo shades, producing high-contrast, three-dimensional fades. Additional details include contrast stitching, a custom Raging Kong leather patch, pink selvedge ID, and antique copper buttons and rivets.

The Denim Jacket a classic denim jacket cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with slash front pockets, inner pocket bags, and chest flap pockets.

  • STYLE / FIT — Denim Jacket
  • 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button fly
  • Made in Canada

product_name: Easy Guy - King Ghidorah: The Three-Headed Monster Denim
description_html:
Introducing the King Ghidorah Denim, a 14oz Japanese denim designed in tribute to one of Godzilla’s most formidable foes: the three-headed kaiju King Ghidorah, who made his debut in the 1964 film Ghidorah, the Three-Headed Monster. Known for his golden scales, hurricane winds, and gravity beams, King Ghidorah stands as a symbol of overwhelming extraterrestrial power.

The denim features a slubby 14oz fabric woven in Japan using a rare triple alternating weave, left-hand twill, right-hand twill, and broken twill, representing Ghidorah’s three independent heads. A gold weft mirrors the shimmering metallic color of his body, subtly visible through the twill lines of the indigo-dyed warp. The uneven texture enhances visual depth while promising strong fades with wear.

This denim is finished with a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch embossed and foil-stamped with licensed King Ghidorah® artwork, full-color Godzilla® poster print pocket bags, and a dual-branded woven label. Cut and sewn in our Canadian factory, the jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

product_name: Super Guy - MIJ7 - Yahan Midnight Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ7 ¢‚¬€œ Yahan Midnight Selvedge is an unsanforized 17oz slubby Japanese selvedge denim dyed to such a deep shade of indigo that it appears black. Indigo rope dyeing is a delicate process of running cotton yarns through two story dye vats quickly enough that the dye cannot penetrate the core of the yarn. Then the yarn dries and is dipped again, dries and is dipped again. The yarns are dipped dozens of times to achieve that raw denim shade. But here, with just a little black dye added, these yarns have been dyed over and over so many times that they appear black. With wear and age, the opposite process occurs. Each layer of indigo chips away revealing dark blues, then medium bright blues, then light blues, then finally the white core of the yarn. This fabric is made to celebrate the full spectrum of variegated indigo shades. The yarns themselves are irregular, slubby, and woven loosely giving the fabric an organic, uneven grain. The denim is unsanforized but tempi treated, which shrinks the fabric but protects the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. The MIJ7 builds in the unparalleled detailing of the Made in Japan collection: black iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the ¢‚¬œFlower of Carnage¢‚¬� logo, the MIJ maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, micro busted outseam, and a selvedge button fly. Dyed, woven, cut, sewn, built in Japan. The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • MIJ7 - Yahan Midnight Selvedge

  • 17oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

product_name: Easy Guy - The Cat’s Pyjamas Selvedge - Blue
description_html:
The Cat’s Pajamas Selvedge is an 8.5oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by early 20th-century workwear and 1920s reproduction fabrics. The name references period slang, when “the cat’s pajamas” was used to describe something exceptional, capturing the spirit of the era this fabric draws from.

Woven with a soft vintage indigo tone and a subtle beige weft, the fabric presents a warm, aged appearance that feels historically grounded rather than modern. A classic white selvedge edge reinforces its traditional construction.

While 8.5oz is considered lightweight today, early 1900s catalogs often marketed 9oz denim as “ultra heavyweight,” making this fabric a faithful interpretation of period-correct denim. Its lighter weight makes it especially suitable for spring and summer while maintaining structure and authenticity.

True to its historical reference, the fabric is finished with a reinforced paper patch rather than leather, reflecting the materials used before leather patches became standard. Tin buttons complete the reproduction-inspired detailing.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • 8.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Indigo
  • Beige weft
  • White selvedge edge
  • Reinforced paper patch
  • Made in Canada

product_name: True Shirt - Slub Yarn Flannel - Navy
description_html:
The Slub Yarn Flannel is a 7oz Japanese fabric woven from slub yarns spun on antique spinning machines. These older machines operate at slower speeds and with less tension than modern equipment, allowing the fibers to twist and bundle irregularly. The result is a yarn with natural thick-and-thin variations, producing a fabric surface that’s subtly bumpy and full of visual texture.

Despite its irregular character, the fabric is soft and comfortable, with a casual, lived-in feel from the start. The slub texture adds depth to the color and pattern of the flannel, while the lightweight 7oz weight makes it versatile enough for layering or wearing on its own across multiple seasons.

The True Shirt is a classic button-up that fits nice and easy, and features a straight hem for an effortless, casual look.

description_html:
The Citrus Kasuri Weft Selvedge is a 14oz Japanese selvedge denim distinguished by its complex weft dyeing technique. Beneath the indigo surface lies a vibrant interior created using traditional Kasuri methods.

Rather than inserting solid-colored weft yarns, Kasuri dyeing involves binding and selectively dyeing sections of yarn before weaving. This results in alternating yellow and green segments along the same yarn, producing organic, patterned coloration rather than uniform stripes.

As the denim wears and abrasions develop, the citrus-toned weft gradually reveals itself through the indigo surface. Due to the labor-intensive nature of Kasuri dyeing, this fabric is used sparingly, making it both expressive and rare.

The Denim Jacket a classic denim jacket cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with slash front pockets, inner pocket bags, and chest flap pockets.

product_name: Strong Guy -  Brown Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Brown Fox Selvedge, a 13oz Japanese selvedge denim made entirely from organic FoxFibre® cotton—grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This denim contains no dyes or bleach. The brown color comes directly from the cotton plant itself.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown cotton varieties with white Pima to create long-staple, naturally pigmented cotton that could be commercially spun. Her work eliminated the need for chemical dyes, significantly reducing the environmental impact of textile production. The FoxFibre® used in this denim is grown using regenerative organic farming methods, making it one of the most sustainable cotton sources available.

The denim is woven in Okayama, Japan, and spun in Osaka, using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown weft yarns. The result is a warm, earthy-toned fabric with subtle surface variation and a soft hand. Over time, the fabric darkens and develops a rich patina with wear and washing.

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

description_html:
Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.

There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.

Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.

To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.

The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge fly, and a micro busted outseam. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.

Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated

product_name: True Guy - The Cat’s Pyjamas Selvedge - Blue
description_html:
The Cat’s Pajamas Selvedge is an 8.5oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by early 20th-century workwear and 1920s reproduction fabrics. The name references period slang, when “the cat’s pajamas” was used to describe something exceptional, capturing the spirit of the era this fabric draws from.

Woven with a soft vintage indigo tone and a subtle beige weft, the fabric presents a warm, aged appearance that feels historically grounded rather than modern. A classic white selvedge edge reinforces its traditional construction.

While 8.5oz is considered lightweight today, early 1900s catalogs often marketed 9oz denim as “ultra heavyweight,” making this fabric a faithful interpretation of period-correct denim. Its lighter weight makes it especially suitable for spring and summer while maintaining structure and authenticity.

True to its historical reference, the fabric is finished with a reinforced paper patch rather than leather, reflecting the materials used before leather patches became standard. Tin buttons complete the reproduction-inspired detailing.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

description_html:
The High Noon Selvedge is a 10oz lightweight Japanese Selvedge Denim, expertly woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. Inspired by the rugged durability of 1900s era jeans, it captures the essence of that period. Just like denim from that era, the High Noon Selvedge is unsanforized to preserve authenticity. However, each pair has undergone a rinse wash to soften the fabric, minimize shrinkage, and simplify sizing. A defining feature of unsanforized denim is the characteristic leg twist, where the side seams twist along the fabric's bias. This adds a distinctive character to each pair, showcasing the old-world methods prior to the development of anti-skewing techniques designed to eliminate such twists. The denim sports a warm, mid-toned indigo hue, reminiscent of vintage pieces, and is highlighted with a orange line selvedge ID. This lighter shade of indigo facilitates quicker fading, enabling you to achieve lighter, vintage-style fades much more rapidly. Designed for immediate comfort, the High Noon Selvedge is lightweight and soft, requiring no break-in period. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, button fly, a dark brown leather patch, and silver metallic hardware. 

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

product_name: True Guy - MIJ12 - Aomidori Selvedge (No Embroidery)
description_html:
*This is a model without the back pocket embroidery. For the model with the embroidery, please visit this page.

Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.

There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.

Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.

To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.

The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, and selvedge fly.

Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • MIJ12 - Aomidori Selvedge (No Embroidery)
  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101056621

Note: The True Guy features a standard selvedge out seam and not the micro out seam detail as seen in other MIJ models.

description_html:
The MIJ16 Genseki Selvedge is a 19oz unsanforized Japanese selvedge denim developed for maximum texture and character. Genseki translates to “raw ore,” a term used to describe unrefined stone in its natural, extracted state. The name reflects the fabric perfectly. Dense, rough, and heavily textured, this denim feels raw and elemental. Woven using slubby and neppy yarns, the fabric displays an intense, irregular surface with visible neps throughout. This yarn character is amplified through low-tension weaving, allowing the fibers to relax and shift on the loom. An earthy-toned weft adds warmth beneath the indigo warp, enhancing contrast and depth as the denim ages.

To preserve the denim’s hairiness, rough texture, and unsanforized character, the MIJ16 undergoes a Tempi treatment. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its raw surface and structural integrity, removing guesswork from sizing while keeping the denim true to its original feel.

The selvedge edge features an indigo–red–indigo micro-busted line. The narrower selvedge width allows the warp color to extend closer to the edge, with a fine red line providing subtle contrast.

The MIJ16 is finished with a full suite of Made in Japan details, including 100% iron buttons that will rust over time, 100% copper rivets that will oxidize, and raised belt loops designed to fade with wear. A Japanese sheepskin leather patch featuring the “Flower of Carnage” logo anchors the back, while functional details include a selvedge button fly, peekaboo selvedge coin pocket, two-tone stitching, and a chainstitched hem. A maple leaf embroidery on the back pocket completes the MIJ signature.

The MIJ16 is made in Japan from start to finish, from yarn preparation and dyeing to weaving, cutting, and sewing.

In terms of aging and fade potential, the MIJ16 stands alongside the most celebrated MIJ releases. Expect high-contrast fades, deep creasing, and dramatic texture evolution over time. If you’re familiar with the fade performance of the MIJ10, the MIJ16 delivers a similarly intense transformation, with even greater surface complexity.

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

description_html:
The Triple Twist Yarn Flannel is a 7.75oz Japanese cotton fabric woven with a unique three-ply melange yarn. Each yarn is spun from multiple shades of cotton, creating a subtle variation in tone that gives the fabric its three-dimensional depth.

product_name: Denim Jacket  -  Brown Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Brown Fox Selvedge, a 13oz Japanese selvedge denim made entirely from organic FoxFibre® cotton—grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This denim contains no dyes or bleach. The brown color comes directly from the cotton plant itself.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown cotton varieties with white Pima to create long-staple, naturally pigmented cotton that could be commercially spun. Her work eliminated the need for chemical dyes, significantly reducing the environmental impact of textile production. The FoxFibre® used in this denim is grown using regenerative organic farming methods, making it one of the most sustainable cotton sources available.

The denim is woven in Okayama, Japan, and spun in Osaka, using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown weft yarns. The result is a warm, earthy-toned fabric with subtle surface variation and a soft hand. Over time, the fabric darkens and develops a rich patina with wear and washing.

The Denim Jacket a classic denim jacket cut to fit comfortably in the chest and arms with slash front pockets, inner pocket bags, and chest flap pockets.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

description_html:
Introducing the Indigo Sashiko, a 12.5oz indigo rope-dyed Japanese twill, woven with a raised running stitch pattern reminiscent of Judo uniforms. This fabric is highly textured, with the running stitches prominently raised above the base fabric. Inspired by the rigorous demands of Judo, which focuses on grabs and throws, the textured and grippy surface of this fabric provides an ideal base for indigo dye. As the raised portions of the stitches fade at slightly different rates than the base fabric, they create a beautifully nuanced fade pattern. This fabric was woven on a special jacquard loom, capable of creating complex patterns. Made from 100% cotton, this fabric offers a soft hand feel. Each jacket is proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, featuring tonal stitching, black non-reflective hardware, and a deep navy leather patch.

The Zip Jacket is a classic fit jacket with a front zip closure, and side welt pockets. Triple stitched seams for extra durability.

product_name: Strong Guy - Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Leatherface Selvedge is our Halloween release, built around one of the most legendary horror films of all time: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre (1974). Grainy, brutal, and stripped of polish, the movie still feels dangerous, like something that wasn’t supposed to make it to theaters. Its tension comes from what it withholds: there’s little blood, no music, and almost no dialogue from the killer. Just heat, noise, and panic.

This fabric is made with 100% Texas-grown cotton, It’s spun into a 14.5oz rope-dyed indigo selvedge denim with a pale yellow weft, echoing Leatherface’s worn butcher’s apron. The color isn’t bright or clean, it’s the muted, washed-out yellow you see in aged canvas under harsh light.

The selvedge ID is finished in silver and red, nodding to the chrome of the chainsaw and the violence it leaves behind. The fabric is woven in Japan on shuttle looms, giving it a rigid hand and vertical texture that will evolve with wear and fade with time.

Each pair includes a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch, embossed and foil-stamped with officially licensed Leatherface artwork. The pocket bags are fully printed in color with film stills from the original 1974 release. And the co-branded woven label pulls from an actual newspaper ad used to promote the movie’s theatrical run.

Every element was designed to feel true to the film.

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

  • STYLE / FIT — Strong Guy
  • 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada

description_html:
Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.

There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.

Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.

To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.

The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge fly, and a micro busted outseam. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.

Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated

description_html:
The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection is celebrating its 10th iteration with the return of a fan favorite: the iconic Okayama Spirit Selvedge. This marks the first time the original has been rereleased since it was first released in 2013.

The Okayama Spirit is a 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim that is dyed using the indigo rope dyeing process. In this process, cotton yarns are repeatedly run through vats of indigo dye, but not long enough for the dye to fully penetrate the yarn core. This creates a unique pattern in the fabric as thicker sections of the yarn absorb more indigo and thinner sections absorb less. The yarns themselves also have an irregular, slubby texture which adds to the overall texture of the fabric. To further enhance the texture, the denim is slowly woven on vintage shuttle looms, which creates a wavy weave pattern when viewed up close. The combination of the irregular slubby yarns and the loose weaving of the fabric gives it an organic, uneven grain that is signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured look.

To preserve the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel of this unsanforized denim, the MIJ10 undergoes a tempi treatment which shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture. This removes the guesswork from sizing and allows you to get the correct size from the start. The MIJ10 also features a range of finishing touches that add to its character and appeal. These include 100% iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly. The jeans also feature a maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, a signature of the MIJ series.

The MIJ10 is made in Japan from start to finish, ensuring its high quality. The expert craftsmanship that goes into each pair is evident in the attention to detail and care taken at every stage of the production process, from the dyeing of the yarn, weaving of the fabric, to the cutting and sewing of the denim. 

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • MIJ10 - Okayama Sprit
  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan

This removes the guesswork from sizing and allows you to get the correct size from the start. The MIJ10 also features a range of finishing touches that add to its character and appeal. These include 100% iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly. The jeans also feature a maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, a signature of the MIJ series.The MIJ10 is made in Japan from start to finish, ensuring its high quality. The expert craftsmanship that goes into each pair is evident in the attention to detail and care taken at every stage of the production process, from the dyeing of the yarn, weaving of the fabric, to the cutting and sewing of the denim.The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

product_name: True Guy - Fat Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Fat Fox Selvedge, a 22.7oz Japanese duck canvas made entirely from organic FoxFibre cotton, grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This fabric contains no dyes, bleach or chemical coloration. The warm brown color comes directly from the naturally pigmented cotton plant.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown and tan cotton varieties with long-staple white cotton to create spinnable, naturally colored fiber suitable for commercial weaving. Her work eliminates the need for conventional dyeing and greatly reduces the environmental impact associated with textile production. 

Woven in Japan as a heavyweight selvedge canvas, the fabric is constructed using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown FoxFibre weft yarns. At 22.7oz per square yard, it pushes the limits of traditional duck canvas, creating a dense, structured fabric that softens and molds with wear. Natural seed flecks remain visible throughout the yarn, adding texture and depth. Over time, the color deepens with washing and sunlight, developing a patina unique to naturally colored cotton.

The Fat Fox Selvedge is finished with components chosen to highlight the fabric’s natural character, including 100 percent FoxFibre warp and weft, natural ecru pocket bags with visible seed flecks, a natural vegetable tanned leather patch that is chromium free and dye free, a pink selvedge ID for a subtle contrast detail, and antique tone hardware selected to complement the palette.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • Fat Fox Selvedge - Brown
  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 22.7oz Japanese Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada

description_html:
Introducing the 1954 Godzilla Selvedge, a 16oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by the original Godzilla film from 1954. Shot in stark black-and-white, the movie blended realism and symbolism and it’s here where the legend began. This denim mirrors that aesthetic with a black warp and white weft construction and slubby texture that evokes Godzilla’s scaled skin.

Woven in Japan using rope-dyed black warp yarns and undyed white weft yarns, the fabric has pronounced grain and a heavyweight hand that develops high-contrast fades over time. The black-and-white selvedge ID reinforces the original visual tone.

Finished with a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch embossed and foil-stamped with classic 1954 Godzilla® artwork, black-and-white film-poster printed pocket bags, and a dual-branded woven label, all made in Canada with contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.

description_html:
Final release from our Godzilla® collection.

Named after the Japanese word for sludge, slime, or smog, Hedorah™ is the infamous Smog Monster first introduced in the 1971 cult classic Godzilla vs. Hedorah. Unlike any other kaiju, Hedorah™ represents the horrors of urban pollution and toxic waste, a living embodiment of industrial decay.

This jean draws directly from that dark iconography. Hedorah™’s grotesque, evolving forms, polluted atmosphere, and deeply unsettling presence are translated into denim, resulting in one of the most visually striking and unconventional antagonists in the Godzilla universe.

For this release, we selected a 15oz slubby black on black unsanforized Japanese selvedge denim to echo the Smog Monster itself. Dense, irregular, and heavy with character, the fabric features pronounced slubs and a deep, polluted black tone that reveals deeper texture and contrast with wear.

This is the smallest production run of all Godzilla® jeans, making it the most limited release in the collection.

Godzilla® and Hedorah™ are trademarks of Toho Co., Ltd. Used under license.

  • Full-color Godzilla® movie poster pocket bags

The Kawataro Selvedge is a fresh greencast interpretation of our legendary Japan Heritage denim. It draws inspiration from Kawataro, the mischievous Japanese river God, also known as Kappa. Kappa is notoriously famous for his love of cucumbers, sumo wrestling, and playful trickery. Crafted from 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge denim, the Kawataro Selvedge features a distinctly slubby, uneven texture created through low-tension weaving and the use of irregularly-shaped slub yarns. The yarns are rope-dyed in indigo, and due to their unique shape, the dye penetrates unevenly thus resulting in varied absorption across the fabric. As the denim fades with wear, it reveals a striking spectrum of indigo shades, producing high-contrast, three-dimensional fades. Additional details include contrast stitching, a custom Raging Kong leather patch, pink selvedge ID, and antique copper buttons and rivets.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

product_name: True Shirt - Slub Yarn Flannel - Green
description_html:
The Slub Yarn Flannel is a 7oz Japanese fabric woven from slub yarns spun on antique spinning machines. These older machines operate at slower speeds and with less tension than modern equipment, allowing the fibers to twist and bundle irregularly. The result is a yarn with natural thick-and-thin variations, producing a fabric surface that’s subtly bumpy and full of visual texture.

Despite its irregular character, the fabric is soft and comfortable, with a casual, lived-in feel from the start. The slub texture adds depth to the color and pattern of the flannel, while the lightweight 7oz weight makes it versatile enough for layering or wearing on its own across multiple seasons.

The True Shirt is a classic button-up that fits nice and easy, and features a straight hem for an effortless, casual look.

product_name: Weird Guy - MIJ11 - Tokushima Hand Dyed Kakishibu Selvedge
description_html:
The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan 11 - a masterpiece showcasing the richness and depth of ancient Japanese dyeing techniques. The MIJ11 is hand-dyed using the natural and eco-friendly Kakishibu or persimmon dyeing technique. This laborious process involves dipping the yarns by hand in the Kakishibu dye and letting them dry under the sun. The slow weaving process on vintage shuttle looms creates an organic, uneven texture, resulting in a denim with a unique warm brown hue and subtle variation in color.

All the details of MIJ11 are designed to evolve with time. The iron buttons will rust and the copper rivets will oxidize to a beautiful green patina. The jeans also come with a sheepskin leather patch. Each pair is made with care and attention to detail, reflecting the skill and craftsmanship of the artisans who continue to practice this craft.

The MIJ11 is a stunning example of the Kakishibu dyeing technique and a beautiful reminder of the value of traditional practices- they are a symbol of a timeless craft, and a tribute to the beauty of imperfection.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
The Blue Wave Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim, enhanced with a one-wash treatment for improved texture and comfort, while retaining the best qualities of raw denim. This classic indigo x white weft denim has been fabric-rinsed, unlike typical garment washes that can leave jeans looking used. This method reduces fabric shrinkage before cutting and sewing, resulting in neater seams and less puckering in the final product. Although not as rigid as classic raw denim, the rinse wash simply removes starch without significantly altering the denim's fading characteristics. We've essentially pre-soaked the jeans for you. The jeans boast classic Naked & Famous Denim features, including custom silver metallic hardware and a pull-up brown leather patch, all complemented by a golden brown selvedge ID and contrasting thread.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

product_name: Super Guy - Blue Comfort Stretch Selvedge
description_html:
The Blue Comfort Stretch Selvedge is a 14oz Japanese selvedge denim, engineered to prioritize flex, motion, and comfort. This fabric integrates stretch fibers within the weft, facilitating exceptional horizontal movement. Meanwhile, the exterior warp yarns, rope-dyed in rich indigo, are crafted from 100% cotton and are designed to age and fade like traditional raw denim. This denim represents a pioneering achievement, as it combines high-power stretch performance with shuttle loomed heavier weight denim —a first of its kind innovation. The jeans have been rinse-washed to activate the stretch, ensuring instant comfort from the first wear. Other details you’ll find include: a traditional redline selvedge ID, contrast stitching, a brown raging bull leather patch, and silver metallic rivets and buttons.

The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

product_name: Weird Guy - Fat Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Fat Fox Selvedge, a 22.7oz Japanese duck canvas made entirely from organic FoxFibre cotton, grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This fabric contains no dyes, bleach or chemical coloration. The warm brown color comes directly from the naturally pigmented cotton plant.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown and tan cotton varieties with long-staple white cotton to create spinnable, naturally colored fiber suitable for commercial weaving. Her work eliminates the need for conventional dyeing and greatly reduces the environmental impact associated with textile production. 

Woven in Japan as a heavyweight selvedge canvas, the fabric is constructed using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown FoxFibre weft yarns. At 22.7oz per square yard, it pushes the limits of traditional duck canvas, creating a dense, structured fabric that softens and molds with wear. Natural seed flecks remain visible throughout the yarn, adding texture and depth. Over time, the color deepens with washing and sunlight, developing a patina unique to naturally colored cotton.

The Fat Fox Selvedge is finished with components chosen to highlight the fabric’s natural character, including 100 percent FoxFibre warp and weft, natural ecru pocket bags with visible seed flecks, a natural vegetable tanned leather patch that is chromium free and dye free, a pink selvedge ID for a subtle contrast detail, and antique tone hardware selected to complement the palette.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • STYLE / FIT — Weird Guy
  • 22.7oz Japanese Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada

product_name: Work Shirt - Triple Twist Yarn Flannel - Red
description_html:
The Triple Twist Yarn Flannel is a 7.75oz Japanese cotton fabric woven with a unique three-ply melange yarn. Each yarn is spun from multiple shades of cotton, creating a subtle variation in tone that gives the fabric its three-dimensional depth.

While its appearance is reminiscent of wool, the fabric is made from 100% cotton, offering a soft touch and breathable comfort with none of the itchiness associated with wool. The triple twist yarn construction not only adds visual complexity but also gives the cloth a slightly heavier drape and increased durability compared to standard single-ply cotton weaves.

The Work Shirt is a classic fit overshirt with a boxy silhouette, chest pockets and a pen pocket opening in the left pocket.

Care instructions: Hand Wash Cold, may experience shrinkage, but can stretch back out while damp.

The MIJ16 Genseki Selvedge is a 19oz unsanforized Japanese selvedge denim developed for maximum texture and character. Genseki translates to “raw ore,” a term used to describe unrefined stone in its natural, extracted state. The name reflects the fabric perfectly. Dense, rough, and heavily textured, this denim feels raw and elemental. Woven using slubby and neppy yarns, the fabric displays an intense, irregular surface with visible neps throughout. This yarn character is amplified through low-tension weaving, allowing the fibers to relax and shift on the loom. An earthy-toned weft adds warmth beneath the indigo warp, enhancing contrast and depth as the denim ages.

To preserve the denim’s hairiness, rough texture, and unsanforized character, the MIJ16 undergoes a Tempi treatment. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its raw surface and structural integrity, removing guesswork from sizing while keeping the denim true to its original feel.

The selvedge edge features an indigo–red–indigo micro-busted line. The narrower selvedge width allows the warp color to extend closer to the edge, with a fine red line providing subtle contrast.

The MIJ16 is finished with a full suite of Made in Japan details, including 100% iron buttons that will rust over time, 100% copper rivets that will oxidize, and raised belt loops designed to fade with wear. A Japanese sheepskin leather patch featuring the “Flower of Carnage” logo anchors the back, while functional details include a selvedge button fly, peekaboo selvedge coin pocket, two-tone stitching, and a chainstitched hem. A maple leaf embroidery on the back pocket completes the MIJ signature.

The MIJ16 is made in Japan from start to finish, from yarn preparation and dyeing to weaving, cutting, and sewing.

In terms of aging and fade potential, the MIJ16 stands alongside the most celebrated MIJ releases. Expect high-contrast fades, deep creasing, and dramatic texture evolution over time. If you’re familiar with the fade performance of the MIJ10, the MIJ16 delivers a similarly intense transformation, with even greater surface complexity.

The Weird Guy is a regular tapered fit; medium rise, standard thigh and slight taper from the knee to hem

description_html:
The Deep Sea Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim, enhanced with a one-wash treatment for improved texture and comfort, while retaining the best qualities of raw denim. This deep indigo x indigo denim has been fabric-rinsed, unlike typical garment washes that can leave jeans looking used. This method reduces fabric shrinkage before cutting and sewing, resulting in neater seams and less puckering in the final product. Although not as rigid as classic raw denim, the rinse wash simply removes starch without significantly altering the denim's fading characteristics. We've essentially pre-soaked the jeans for you. This denim is made from 100% cotton and features a traditional redline selvedge ID.  Each pair is proudly crafted in our Canadian factory and features contrast stitching, a button fly, custom black mill-spec non-reflective hardware and a pull-up navy leather patch.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
Available In Store Only - Retail Price: $229 CAD

Le Selvedge de la Belle Province is a 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim inspired by Montreal, Quebec, the home of Naked & Famous Denim.  La Belle Province is the motto of Quebec, which in English, translates to “The Beautiful Province”.  Within Canada, Quebec is distinct as it is a French-speaking nation with its own unique naughty words – which you will find woven right into the selvedge.  You will also notice the fleur de lis along with the white and blue line selvedge id, representing the symbols and colors of Quebec.  The denim is woven using short slub irregular-shaped yarns to give the fabric a gritty look.  The natural veg-tanned leather patch features an alternative edition of the classic tragic blond logo with the words Denim Tout Nu & Célèbre, French for Naked & Famous Denim, as well as some nods to Montreal landmarks.  The artwork was created by local Montreal comic book artist Andy Bélanger.  Other details include contrast stitching, and silver metallic buttons and rivets.

This jean was made to celebrate the hometown of Naked & Famous Denim and function as a special souvenir for those making the trip to Montreal.  This is why these jeans will not be available for purchase online, but will be exclusively available for in-store purchase at Tate + Yoko, located at 9096 St. Laurent

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.
